title: CH. 1. SSS 9.
content:
Mwe bantu bonse ba pa nshi," , "All people that on Earth do Dwell", "Mwe bantu bonse ba pa nshi,
    Mulumbanyeni, mutote,
No kumutemwa iseni,
    Imbeni pa cinso cakwe.

Ibukisheni ni Lesa,
    Atubumbile fwe bonse;
Alatucema nge mpanga,
    Pantu ifwe tuli bakwe.

Ingileni no muchinshi,
   Shi palameni no kwanga,
‘Shina lyakwe lumbuleni,
   Ici cine e cisuma.

Lesa wesu e musuma,
   Ali no luse kuli fwe;
‘Cine cakwe ciminina
   ‘Nshiku ne nshiku shonse pe.

title: CH. 2. SSS 11.
content:
Itoteleni" , "O worship the King", "Itoteleni
    ‘Mfumu nkalamba,
Imbileni mwe
    ‘Luse na maka;
Ni nkwela yakosa
    ‘Kuti tucingwe,
Kwi sano e kwaba
    Ku mulu kwine.

Imbenya maka,
    ‘Cikuku pamo,
‘Busamo nkansu,
    ‘Mulu e sano;
‘Mwela na makumbi,
    E wafilenga;
‘Cipupu ne nfifi
    E mo endela.

‘Calo na fyonse
Ifyasangwamo,
    Fyabumbwa kale
Ku maka yakwe.
    Acipampamike
Kwi funde lya pe,
    Abika mabemba
Yacilibishe.

‘Bupe bwa mwine
    Bwa kupapisha,
Ni mu lwelele
    Na mu kasuba;
Bwatula ku mpili,
    Bwaya ku nika.
Bwaisa mu mume
,     Buli mu mfula.

‘Bena lukungu
    ‘Banaka ni fwe,
Twamusumina,
    Talaya bufi;
Ubupe busuma
    E bo twapelwa,
Kabumba, Kacinga,
    Na Kalubula.

Ni ‘mwe lubuto,
    Ni ‘mwe uluse.
‘Bangeli pamo
    Bamwimbila pe.
Pamo ne fwe bene
    Mu nyimbo shesu,
Ne ndimi sha cine
    Twimbilyo mulu.

title: CH 33. SSS 22.
content:
Imwe mwalibuta, Lesa mu mulu," , "Holy, Holy, Holy", "Imwe mwalibuta, Lesa mu mulu,
Pa kacelocelo lwimbo twamwimbila;
Imwe mwalibuta, ba luse na maka,
Lesa patatu, twamulumbanya.

Imwe mwalibuta, benu baletota,
‘Kubike fitebo ku makasa yenu;
Bonsha ba mu mulu bamufukamina,
Imwe ba kale, mwakulabapo.

Imwe mwalibuta, muli ulubuto,
‘Menso ya babipa te ‘ti yamumone.
Mwalibuta mweka, na bambi tapali,
Ni ‘mwe bam aka, ni mwe ba luse.

Imwe mwalibuta, Lesa mu mulu,
Imilimo yenu ilamulumbanya;
Imwe mwalibuta, ba luse na maka,
Lesa patatu, twamulumbanya.

title: CH 48. SSS 513.
content:
Mwe Lesa kafwa wa kale," , "O God our Help", "Mwe Lesa kafwa wa kale,
   Twamucetekela;
Cubo cesu ku cipupu,
   Ne nganda yesu pe.

Abantu benu batemwa,
   Apo mubabaka;
‘kuboko kwenu kwa maka
   Kwakulatucinga.

‘Lintwi mpili tashalipo,
   ‘Calo conse pamo,
Mu nshita shonse mwe Lesa
   Mwikala umo.

Kuli imwe myaka ingi
   Ngo bushiku bumo;
‘Nshiku shesu na sho bwipi
   Ngo mumyo lucelo.

‘Myaka yaya ngo mumana,
   Abantu balafwa,
Balabwe fintu cilabwa
   ‘Ciloto lucelo.

 Mwe Lesa kafwa wa kale,
   Twamucetekela;
Mutulame nshiku shonse
   Fwe bantu mwatemwa.

title: CH 8. SSS 765.
content:
Tusekele no kwanga," , "Let us with a Gladsome Mind", "Tusekele no kwanga,
Pantu Lesa musuma.

     Pantu aba no luse
     Pa bantu bakwe bonse.

Bonse tumutotele,
Ni Lesa eka wene.

Icalo abumbile,
Ne fyaba umo wine.

Aba ne fintu fyonse,
Alatulela bonse.

Ku luse atumona,
Nangu tubya babipa,

E co tusekelele,
Lesa tumulumbanye.

title: CH 137. SSS 155.
content:
Tusekelyo Mwine" , "Rejoice the Lord is King", "Tusekelyo Mwine
   Ni Mfumu ya bantu,
Tumutotele fwe,
   No kwimbile Mfumu.

      Imye shiwi no mutima,
      Sekela no kusekela.

Yesu ni Katula,
   Aleteka bantu;
Ilya ‘tufwilile
   Aile ku mulu.

Ubufumu bwakwe
   Teti kuti bupwe ’yo;
Ulusa akwata
   Lwa mfwa no lwa ku Mbo.

Kwa Lesa e kwali,
   Basukya balwani
Banashiwe pa nshi
   Ya makasa yakwe.

Tucetekele few,
   Akabwela Kristu
‘Kututwala bonse
   Ku mwesu ku mulu.

title: CH. 9. SSS 1.
content:
We mutima, ulumbanye" , "Praise my Soul", "We mutima, ulumbanye
    Mfumu yesu yam ulu;
Walubulwa, waelelwa,
    N’ani wa kwimbilo lu?

        Ulumbanye, ulumbanye,
        Lumbanye Mfumu ya pe.

Mulumbanishisho bupe,
    Batata bapelwobu;
Mu busanso baikele’
    Abopokolwelemo.

Atuteke ngo mufyashi,
    Alishibe fyo twaba;
Mu maboko atusenda,
    No kutupokolola.

Bonse mu mulu mutwafwe
    ‘Kuti tutote bwino,
Mwashuka ukuba nankwe,
    Mwamumona pa menso.

title: CH 150. SSS 243.
content:
Indimi shingi ndefwaya" , "O for a Thousand Tongues", "Indimi shingi ndefwaya
   Sha kwibila Yesu;
Ifya bucindami bwakwe,
   No luse ne nkumbu.

Afuluganya fya bubi,
   Akakula nkole;
Amusamba no mulopa,
   Leka ansambe ‘ne.

Asosa; baumfwe shiwi;
   Abafwa baima,
Basekela abakabi,
   Baanga bapina.

Mumfwe, we wakoma matwi;
   Cibulu mulumbe;
We mpofu. Mone Mfumwi yi;
   Cilema, ciluka.

Yesu e shina lisuma,
   Litamfyo bulanda,
Lyawamisha ku babipa,
   ‘Mutende no mweo.

Mwe Mfumu Lesa Shikulu.
   Mungafwe ukwimba;
No kuti nshimike pe fye
   ‘Shine li lisuma.

title: CH 3.
content:
Twamilumbanya mwe Lesa," , "We praise we Worship Thee", "Twamilumbanya mwe Lesa,
Amaka yenu twaimba;
Abena fyalo batota
Kuli imwe, mwe ba Shifwe.

Ni Aleluya twaimba,
Pamo na bangeli bonse;
‘Ba mu mulu, ‘ba pano nse
Balamwimbila pe na pe.

Baleti: Ba mushilo mwe
Lesa mutotelwa konse;
Panwe sonde na mu mulu,
Mulimo ne fya bukulu.

Na ‘bwa bwafwilile Mfumu,
Balemwawila mu mulu;
Cilonganino ca pano
Ciletotela ca pamo.

‘Lulumbi lube kuli ‘mwe,
Mwe Lesa Shifwe pe na pe;
Ku Mwana na ku Mupashi,
Lesa umo wa mu mulu.

title: SSS 23.
content:
Natotelwe Lesa, alifulwile," , "To God be the Glory", "Natotelwe Lesa, alifulwile,
Atemwa calo, apele Mwane;
Uwatufwilile e lambo lyesu,
Atwiswilo mulu ‘fwe twingilemo.

  Mwimbile! mwimbile! ‘calo cumfwe na co.
  Mwimbile! mwimbile! babe no buseko.
  Isa kuli Lesa mu Mwana wakwe,
  Umulumbanishe, alifulwile.

Ubu bulubulo ubwa mulopa,
E bulayo bwine ku wasumina,
Na ku wabipisha nga asumina,
Kashita Kenya ko alaelelwa.

Alifundisha, Alituwamya,
Na ifwe twalyangu mu Mwana wakwe,
Lelo tukacila mu kusekela,
Ilyo tukamona Yesu Katula.

title: CH 73. SSS 212.
content:
Mwe bena Lesa," , "Ye Servants of God", "Mwe bena Lesa,
    Akulumbeni,
Shi shimikeni
    Ishina lyakwe;
Ishine lyacimfya
    Ilya kwa Yesu,
Ubufumu bwakwe
    Bwaanda konse.

Lesa ‘liteka,
    Wa maka yonse;
Aba mupepi
    Na bantu bakwe.
Ne cilonganino
    Cilemwimbila,
Bati, ”Ululumbi
    Lupelwe Yesu.”

Ipusukilo
    Ni Lesa eka;
Bonse bapunde,
    Bamucindike.
Balumbanya Yesu
    ‘Bangeli bene,
Bamuwila pa nshi,
    Ba mutotela.

Twimbile bonse,
    Tumupe fyonse:
‘Lulumbya, maka.
    ‘Mano no mweo.
Bucindamo bonse,
    Na matotelo,
Twakulamupela
    Tucili pano.

title: CH 11.
content:
Lesa wandi ndemutasha," , "My God How Wonderful", "Lesa wandi ndemutasha,
    ‘Busamo bwa cine,
‘Cifulo cenu busaka,
    Calibutisha pe.

Te ‘ti mpende myaka yenu,
    Muli Lesa wa pe.
Akasuba no bushiku
    ‘Bangeli batota.

‘Kumumona e cisuma,
    Mwe Mfumu Shikulu.
Muli ba mano na maka,
    Mwalibuta tutu.

Mwe Mfumu nalimutemwa,
    Ba maka yonse ‘mwe,
Lelo mwafwaya ne mwano
    Ukuti ncilepo.

Nangu tata nangu mayo,
    Takuli pano nse
Abatemwe fyo mwatemwa
    Ne mwano wabipa.

  Wishi kwa Yesu, Katula,
    Cikabe cisuma
Ukulamufukamina,
    No kumulolesha.

title: CH 58.
content:
Shikulu e Mfumu; ‘calo" , "The Lord is King", "Shikulu e Mfumu; ‘calo
Cisekelele ne myulu.
Konse konse cilumbuke
Ifyo Shikulu e Shifwe.

Shikulu e Mfumu; n’ani
Wingapamo kumukana?
Nelyo kumung’wintaula,
No kukanamusumina?

Shikulu e Mfumu; ‘Mwine
E Kapingula wa cine;
‘Nshila shakwe sha cishinka,
Abantu besemuwila.

Ateka; mwe basambi mwe,
Mwakulalumbanya Shifwe,
Na Yesu ‘waba mu mulu
Uwatanikwe ngo muntu.

Bushe Lesa engaluba,
No luse lwakwe lukapwa?
Ni ‘ifyo abakwe beleka
‘Kwimba fyo Shifwe ateka.

title: CH 46.
content:
Nyimba maka ya kwa Lesa," , "I sing the Almighty power", "Nyimba maka ya kwa Lesa,
    Ayalenge mpili,
Ayabika na mabemba,
    Ne fya mulu fyonse.

Nyimba mano ayatusha
    ‘Kasube nshiku pe;
No mweshiwa kubalika,
    E ne ntanda shonse.

Nyimbo busumino bufusha
    Ifilyo mu calo,
Fya mweo fyonse alenga,
    Ati, “Fyawame fyo.”

‘Maluba yonse pano nse
    Yalumbanya Lesa,
‘Fipupu e na makumbi
    Fyaumfwa kuli ‘mwe.

Utwa mweo twa mu calo
    Twabakwa na Lesa,
Konse konse mu fifulo
    E pwali, amona.

Alembaka no kuboko,
    No kutungulula.
Na ine nshakamulabe,
    ‘Unsunge nshiku pe.

title: CH 12.
content:
Lwa ciyaya, ‘Lubuto’," , "Eternal Light", "Lwa ciyaya, ‘Lubuto’,
    ’Fyo engabutisha
Uwaikala na imwe,
Tatina, lelo ne nseko
    Atemwa, ‘lolesha.

‘Mipashi yaikalako
    Yene yabelela,
Lelo yeka yaba ifyo,
Tayaikele pa calo,
    Tayali yabipa.

Yangu, ine, ne wa mfifi
    Mfike uko shani,
Ku kumoneka kwa Lesa,
No ko kubengeshiminwa?
    ‘Lubuto luloca!

Kuli inshile yayako,
    Kulyo kwawamisha;
Kuli ilambo lya cine,
No Mupashi wa mushilo,
    E na Ndubulwila.

Ifi filetuteyanyo
    Kwikalo ko kwine;
Aba mfifi no bushiku
Bengekala mu lubuto
    Pantu kulyu luse.

title: SSS 223.
content:
Wa mushilo, wene e Mfumu," , "Holy is the Lord", "Wa mushilo, wene e Mfumu,
    Mwe bantwi mbeni, mufukamine.
Pe shiwi mpili shitutume,
    Ne milundu nay o icankwe.
‘Mano na maka, ‘congwe cafula,
    Lesa e Mfumu iya bonse.

         Wa mushilo, wene e Mfumu,
         Ne milundu na yo icankwe.

Mwimbileni, sha mwawileni.
    Bakashimika shi mulumbeni.
‘Mfwa ne fibi alonaula,
    ‘Fyalo fyonse fikamulumba.
Mumulumbanya mwe bamumona,
    ‘Ba mu busamo bwacilisha.

Wene akalatotelwa pe,
    E fyo bamwane bamutotele;
Na mu mulu tukamwimbila,
    Tukesatula ifya bupe.
‘Kumupalanya pa kushibuka,
    Tukamumona no kwimbila.

title: CH 550. SSS 1024.
content:
Makana na makana" , "Ten Thousand Times", "Makana na makana
    Ya fwikwa tutu,
Ifita fya balubulwa
    Fyanina ku mulu.
Fyapwa fyonse nafipwa,
    Ukulwa ne fibi;
Beswileni ifipata,
    Aba kabengile.

       Aleluya, aleluya,
            Ku watufwilile.
       Aleluya, aleluya,
            Na o aliimine.

‘Nyimbo sha Aleluya
    Mu calo, mu mulu!
‘Kulisha kwa masese ku-
    letwebo bwanshisho.
We bushiku busuma
    Bwa fyabumbwa fyonse;
We nseko, ulefumyapo
    Ubulanda bonse.

E, tukaceleshanya
    Mu mulu mwi shilya
Pa kukumanye fibusa
    No kushilekana.
Amenso yakabeka,
    ‘Yalile filamba,
Tabalimo bakashiwa,
    Nelyo mukamfwilwa.

 ‘Bupususho nabwise,
    We Lambo lyawama;
Mufishe mpendwa ya bantu
    Abo mwalubula.
Mwe bafwaikwa, mwise,
    ‘Benu bafuluka;
Balangeni cishibilo,
    Mwe Mfumu, Katula.

title: SSS 208.
content:
Lumbanyeni Yesu uwatulubula," , "Praise Him! Praise Him!", "Lumbanyeni Yesu uwatulubula,
Imbisheni bonse ba pano nse;
Celeleni Yesu, mwe bali mu mulu,
Ishina lipelwe ‘bucindamo.
Nga kacema Yesu abaka abana,
Mu maboko alabasenda pe.

      Lumbanyeni, lumbuleni ubukulu,
      Mwimbileni no lwimbo pe na pe.

Lumbanyeni Yesu uwatulubula,
Aculile, apelelwe, afwa;
Wene Libwe lyesu Ilya bupususho,
Celeleni Yesu watanikwe.
Temwisheni Yesu watufwilie,
‘Luse, congwe, no kutemwa kwa pe.

Lumbanyeni Yesu uwatulubula,
Na Hosana ku mulu kwaumfwa;
Yesu wene abelelelyo kuteka,
Lumbanyeni Katula ne Mfumu.
Uwa kwisa e ukacimfya bonse,
Alikwata maka no lulumbi.

title: SSS 1023.
content:
Ne sese ne penga ‘bengi baliko," , "With Harps and with Viols", "Ne sese ne penga ‘bengi baliko,
Na mu cinso ca Mfumu bembo lwimbo lu;

       Kuli uyo watutemwa, watulubula,
       Kuli wenyu lulumbi inshiku shonse.

Abalya babipa basangululwa,
Nabafwikwe fyabuta no kwimba pamo:

Fwe bali basangu atucite mfumu,
Atufundishe nomba twimbyo lwimbo lu:

Twalubile mu mfifi, twali abasha,
Lelo alitusamba, twasangululwa:

Tumulumbanishe Ifumu Yesu,
’Kuti bambi pa kumfwa bamwimbilyo lu:

title: CH 136. SSS 203.
CH 56. SSS 516.
content:
Lesa ‘cite finjelengwe" , "God Moves in a Mysterious Way", "Lesa ‘cite finjelengwe
    ‘Kubomba imilimo;
Alenda na pa cambeshi,
    E, na mu cipupu.

Mwe bantu bakwa batina,
    Ikoselesheni,
Ico mwatina, caleta
    ‘Bupalo kuli ‘mwe.

‘Mifwaile yakwe yonse
    Yalasokoloka;
Icalula pa kubala,
    Pa numa calowa.

 ‘Bushisumino bwabipa
    Te kuti bwiluke;
Leso mwine nga ‘ilula,
    Walaishibisha.

title: HK 2.
content:
Fibumbwa fyose fya pa nshi," , "All Creature of our God", "Fibumbwa fyose fya pa nshi,
Aleni, twimble Mfumu.
Alelulya, Alelulya.
We kasuba wabalika,
Nobe we mweshi ‘bushiku,
Mulumbanye, mulumbanye;
Aleluya, Aleluya, Aleluya.

We mwela wa cipupu we,
We kumbi wayo lubilo,
Mulumbanye, Aleluya.
Kuca kulatashe Mfumu,
Myengelele, imye shiwi,
 Mulumbanye, mulumbanye:
 Aleluya, Aleluya, Aleluya.

Mumana we mu kupita,
Bulo lwimbo no kutasha
‘Mfumu Lesa, shi imbeni.
Mulilo wa kwafwa bantu,
No kubapelo lubuto,
Imye shiwi, mulumbanye:
Aleluya, Aleluya, Aleluya.

We mayo calwe nshiku pe
Watupe fya kulya fyonse,
Ulu lwimbo mwimbileni.
Fimuti na maluba mwe,
Langenyu lulumbi lwakwe,
Toteleni Mfumu Lesa:
Aleluya, Aleluya, Aleluya.

Abatemwana mu bantu,
Abelelana, imbeni,
Temwisheni Mfumu yenu.
Na ‘balecula nshiku pe,
Basansamuke, babule
‘Shiwi ili lya kutota:
Aleluya, Aleluya, Aleluya.

We mfwa waisa kuli ‘fwe,
Mu kutalala, shili,
Tatutina, we munensu,
Ni ‘we nkombe ya kwa shifwe,
Watwalo mwana ku mwabo.
We mfwa, mune, we mutembo:
Aleluya, Aleluya, Aleluya.

Fibumbwa fyonse fya pa nshi,
Filumbanye no mucinshi
Lesa wesu, ‘Mfumu yesu,
Tasheni Shifwe no Mwana,
Na o Mupashi Wabuta.
Lumbanyeni, batasheni:
ALeluya, Aleluya, Aleluya.

title: CH 82.
content:
Shibukeni bonse b aba kwa Kristu!" , "Christians Awake!", "Shibukeni bonse b aba kwa Kristu!
Alifyalwa Katula wa bantu;
Imbeni mulumbanye uluse
Luntu balelumbula bangeli;
Kuli abwe landwe lyatendeke,
Lya kwa Yesu, Mwana wa Mushimbe.

Kuli bakacema lyasoselwe,
E baumfwilyo mungeli, ati:
’’Namuletele landwe lisuma,
Ilya kufyalwa kwa kwa Katula;
Ilelo Lesa ‘cito bulayo,
Acifyalwa Katula, ni Kristu.”

Asosele, nge lyo line bonse
Mu nyimbo sha lubuto, bangeli
Batendekyo kulumbulo luse
Lwa bulubulo bwa Mupusushi;
Batile, “Lulumbi kuli Lesa,
Ku ba mu calo na bo mutende.”

Twikatishe mu mitima yesu
Uluse lwa kwa Lesa ku bantu;
Twamumono yu watulubula,
Wa mwi tanga, uwa ku lupanda;
Tumukonke, akulatwafwa pe
‘Kufika ku mwesu mu lulumbi.

Twafwaya mwi bumba lya bangeli
Ukwimbo lwimbo lwa kwa Katula;
Uyo wafyalwa pa bushiku ‘bu
Akatulango lulumbi ulu;
Luse lwakwe e lwatupususha,
Mu mulu Mfumu tukalumbanya.

title: CH 80. SSS 31.
content:
Mwise mutote," , "O Come all ye Faithful", "Mwise mutote,
Mwe ba busumino,
Iseni ku Mwine ku Mbetleyemu;
Tuye tumone
Mwine wa ku mulu.

     Mwise tumutotele
     Mwise tumutotele,
     Mwise tumutotele
     Kristu Mfumu.

Lesa wa bumi,
‘Mwine wa lubuto,
Uyo wafyalilwe mu Mbetleyemu;
Shifwe no Mwana,
No buteko bonse.

Toteni bonse,
Mwe bali mu mulu,
Angileni lelo mu Mbetleyemu;
Mulumbanyeni,
E Mwine wa fyonse.

Mwe Mfumu nomba
Ifwe twamuposha,
Imwe mwafyalilwe mu Mbetleyemu;
Ni Mwana Lesa,
Aishilyo muntu.

title: CH 81. SSS 30.
content:
Umfweni aba ku mulu" , "Hark! the Herald Angels", "Umfweni aba ku mulu
Balelumbanye Mfumu;
Ilelo yatufyalilwa
Ukutuwikishanya.
Imeni mwe bena fyalo,
Ne ndimi imbeni na sho;
Atufyalilwa Kristu,
Mu mushi Mbetleyemu.

     Umfwenya ba ku mulu,
     Balelumbanye Mfumu.

‘Ba mu mulu batotela Kristu
Shikulu wa pe;
Nomba atumonekela,
E Mwana wa mushimbe.
Bulesa buli mu muntu,
Muceleleni mwe bantu,
Aikala muli ‘fwe,
Yesu ni Imanyule.

Celeleni Wa mutende,
No yo Wa bololoke;
‘Lubuto, mweo aleta,
Aiso kutuposha.
Ku lulumbi afumako,
Ukutya bantu bekafwa;
Afyalilwa abantu
Babe aba kwa Kristu.

 Mwe Bafwaikwa ku bantu,
Mwikale kuno mwesu;
Ni ‘mwe Mwana wa mushimbe,
Mutwanshishe ifibi.
Twimbe na bwa balubulwa:
“Imfumu yatufyalilwa;
Ululumbi mu mulu,
No mutende pa bantu.”

title: CH 90
content:
‘Fintwa bantu ba kale" , "As with Gladness", "‘Fintwa bantu ba kale
Ulutanda bamwene,
‘Fintu balucelele,
Lwaleya lwabalike;
Ifyo fine, mwe Mfumu,
Tutwalwe na ku mulu.

‘Fintu baya no kwanga,
Kuli imwe ku nganda,
Ku kumufukamina,
Untu baletotela;
Ifyo fine, mwe Mfumu,
Tumufwaya ku mulu.

‘Fintwa bantu bapele
‘Bupyo bwingi bwafina;
No kwanga ifyo fine
Tumupele fya bupe,
Kuli imwe, mwe Mfumu,
‘Mupusushi, Shikulu.

Yesu Kristu nshiku pe
Mu lwendo mutubake;
Nga fyapwe fya mu calo,
Mukatufishe uko
Ukushabo lutanda
Lwa kututungulula.

‘Calo cilya ku mulu,
Tabafwaya lubuto;
Ni ‘mwe lubuto, ‘nseko,
Ni ‘mwe lubuto, ‘nseko,
Ni,’mwe kasuba uko;
Tukembila mu mulu
Aleluya ku Mfumu.

title: CH 87. SSS 33.
content:
Bakacema balindile" , "While Sherpherds Watched", "Bakacema balindile
    Mpanga ubushiku;
Umungeli aikile,
    ‘Lulumbi lwa mulu.

“Mwilatina,” asoseshe
    Abali no mwenso,
“Ndemuletela, na bonse,
    Ilandwe lya nseko:

“Mu mushi wa kwa Dabidi
    Afyalwa ilelo,
‘Mfumu Kristu, ‘Mupusushi,
    E bulangililo:

“Mwana munono wa mulu
    Mulemusangamo,
Alemoneka ku bantu,
    Ali mu mukondo.”

E fyo asoso wa ntanshi,
    E lyo lyamoneka
Ibumba ilya bangeli
    Balumbanya Lesa:

“Ululumbi kuli Lesa,
    ‘Mutende mu calo,
‘Fya busuma fyatendeka
    Nomba no kupwa ‘yo”

title: CH 86.
content:
Lyaishile ubushiku," , "It Came upon the Midnight", "Lyaishile ubushiku,
   Ilandwe lya kale,
Lyafumine ku bangeli,
   Abasoso kuti:
“Mutende ube mu calo
   Ufume ku mulu.”
‘Bantunse babe tondolo,
   Bomfwe abangeli.

Ku fyabipa ne fya bulwi
   ‘Bantunse bacula,
Imyaka yapita ingi 
   Iya fyabipisha.
Abalelwa te ba kumfwa
   Ulwimbo lwa luse;
Shi talaleni mwe bantu,
   Mumfwe abangeli.

Mwe bafininwa ne fibi,
   Mwe basakamikwa,
Mwe baleendo bulendo
   Lubomba lubomba.
Inukeni! ‘nshita ipya
   Yaiso lubilo;
Tusheni muno mu nshila,
   Mumfwe abangeli.

Moneni nshiku shaisa,
   Ishalelumbulwa
Na kasesema wa kale,
   Inshiku shawama.
E lyo mutende ukesa-
   Fika konse konse;
Ne fyalo fyonse fyaimba
   ‘Lwimbo lwa bangeli.

title: SSS 34.
content:
Afyalilwa kuli ifwe" , "To us a Child of Hope", "Afyalilwa kuli ifwe
    Untu alolelwa;
‘Ba mu mulu batotela.
    Na bantu mu calo.

Uwa mutende e shina,
    Afuma ku mulu;
Wa finjelengwe, Wa maka,
    Wa bonse ni Mfumu.

Amaka te ‘ti yakapwe,
    Akalabateka,
No bololoke mu mulu,
    ‘Mutende mu calo.

title: SSS 54.
content:
Imbeni ulwimbo lwa kale," , "Come Sing the Sweet Song", "Imbeni ulwimbo lwa kale,
    Ulwimbo lwa Imanyuli,
Lwafuma ku mwinshi wa mulu
    Ulwa kulumbanye Mfumu.

       Ikatisheni ifya nseko,
           Imbeni no kusansula;
       Icalo casuka ne nseko,
           Ulwimbo lwe landwe ili.

Ba kasesema basosele,
    Leso mwine e wapanga,
Nomba conse nacicitika,
    Twalumbanya kalubula.

Imyaka balecetekela
    Ukwisa kwakwe pano nse,
Abena fyalo bafwaile
    ‘Kulumbule shina lyakwe.

Ulwimbo ulwacila shonse,
    Twaimbile Mfumu yesu,
Twatasho waisalubula,
    Ni ‘Manyule, Yesu Kristu.

title: CH 720. SSS 32.
content:
Ni mu mushi wa kwa Dabid" , "Once in Royal David’s city", "Ni mu mushi wa kwa Dabid
    Mwali tanga lya ombe,
Umo nyina abikile
    Umwana mu mukondo.
       Ni Maliya e nyina;
       Yesu Kristu e mwana.

Aikele pano pa nshi,
    ‘Uli Mfumu ya bonse;
Ng’anda yakwe yali tanga,
    No busanshi mukondo.
        Aikelyo mwaice,
        Uyo e Mupusushi.

Wene e cikope cesu,
    Akulile nga ifwe;
Abelyo mwana munono,
    Aseka no kwangala.
        Omfwo bucushi bwesu,
        Pamo ne nseko shesu.

Nomba mwi tanga talimo,
    Umwe gombe shilala;
Lelo ali pamo ne fwe,
    Na mu mulu mwa Lesa.
        Ifwe tumupashanye,
        Nelyo tuli baice.

title: SSS 27.
content:
Tacabala ‘cipona," , "Never Shone a Light so Fair", "Tacabala ‘cipona,
Tacabalilya ‘cimbwa,
Nge nyimbo mu lwelele
‘Shaimbilya bangeli;
‘Ntanda shonse shilumbule:

       Naisa Uwa mutende,
       Ku kwikala muli ‘fwe,
       Ni Yesu Kristu,
       Ni Yesu Imanyule.

Lulya lwimbo na nomba
Lwaumfwikwa pa maca;
E po lwacilaimbwa,
‘Lubuto lwabalika;
‘Ba pano nse balumbule:

Twacelela kasuba
Umo twamutotela;
Nga twaiso kupepa,
No kumulumbanisha;
‘Fyalo fyonse filumbule:

title: CH 758. SSS 26.
content:
Akamushi Mbetleyemu" , "O little Town of Bethlehem", "Akamushi Mbetleyemu
    Akali tondolo,
Abana bonse ba bantu
    Basendamo tulo.
Nangwi mfifi ya bushiku
    Yali pano pa nshi,
Uyo waiso Lubuto
    Abo Mupusushi.

Kuli Meri afyalilwe
    Yesu Kristu, ‘Mfumu;
Nabangeli baloleshe,
    Balinda ku mulu.
Mwe ntanda shonse sha mulu
    Shimikileniko,
‘Lulumbi lube kwa Lesa,
    ‘Mutende mu calo.

Ica ca bupe icalo
    Capelwa na Lesa;
Na co caisa tondolo,
    ‘Kwabulo kukafya.
Ifyo fine na ku bantu
    Lesa apela pe;
Ica cine ne cikuku
    Muli ‘fwe cikale.

We Mwana wa mushilo, we
    Wa mu Mebetleyemu,
Wise wikale muli ‘fwe,
    Ufumyo lubembu.
Twaumfwo lwimbo ku mulu
    Lwe landwe lisuma;
Wise kuli ‘fwe, we Mfumu,
    Wikale Katula.

title: CH 759.
content:
Mu mpanga ni bakacema" , "In the Fields with their Flocks", "Mu mpanga ni bakacema
Balele ubushiku,
‘Fitekwa na fyo pamo
Mwi samba lya mulu.
Ilyo lubuto lwine
Lwaisabaponena,
‘Mungeli ainamine
Pa kwimbe fya luse:
Cake cabalilapo,
E lwimbo lushakapwe.

    “Ku mulu lulumbi lube,
    ‘Mutende pano nse.

Kuli ‘mwe nafyalwe lelo
‘Mupusushi mu mushi.”
E lyamoneke bumba
Ilya balesosa,
Babilile ilandwe
Ilyacile lya kale,
Ku mulu takulaumfwa
Ilya kuba nge li;
Baleimbile caka,
Mu lwimbo lushakapwe.

Bakacema balishile
No kutambo Mwano yu,
Bapapile, batota, 
Na nyina ‘temenwe.
Baima, babwelele
Ku milimo ku mwabo,
Mu nshila bashimikile
“Katula afyalwa”;
Baimbe fya bangeli
Mu lwimbo lushakapwe.

title: CH 761.
content:
Baleimbo bushiku," , "All this Night", "Baleimbo bushiku,
Abangeli ku mulu;
Umfweni shiwi ili:
Mwe bantunse imeni;
        Ubulanda
        Bube nseko;
Nakatula Kasuba
Mu bushiku kabala.

Shi shibuka we calo!
Nakuletele nseko;
Shi shibuka! Ku mulu
Nakubuto bushiku.
        Baletamba
        ‘Ca kupapa.
Abangeli na bantu
Balumbanye fya mulu.

Twacelela Kasuba,
Muno calo katumwa;
Kabalike pali ‘few
Mu mutima yesu pe.
        Pantu cine
        Ni ‘mwe bene
Muntu Kabili Lesa,
Mwe Lubuto, mwaisa.

title: CH 675.
content:
Mwe bena Kristu mwange," , "Good Christian Men Rejoice", "Mwe bena Kristu mwange,
Ne mitima na mashiwi,
Mumfwe ne fyo twalanda:
      ‘Landwe.’
Yesu Kristu nafyalwa
Mwi tanga lya fitekwa,
Ni mu mukondo abikwa,
      Ali afyalwa.

Mwe bena Kristu mwange,
Ne mitima na mashiwi;
Muleumfwe fya nseko:
      Nseko!
Yesu acifyalilwa
‘Kutwiswila ku mulu,
Abantu bakalashuka,
      Ali afyalwa.

Mwe bena Kristu mwange,
Ne mitima na mashiwi;
Nomba mwilatina mfwa:
      Mweo!
Alya ‘fyalwa Katula,
Aetwita fwe bonse,
Tusumine landwe lyakwe,
      Ali afyalwa.

title: CH 528.
content:
Moneni mu mulimba!" , "See in Yonder Manger", "Moneni mu mulimba!
‘Kana katufyalilwa:
Kalailwe kale fye,
Katupusushe bonse.

    Ubushiku bwapalwa!
    Bwaco bwa cilubula:
    Kristu Yesu Imfumu
    Afyalwa mu Betlemu.

E mwali mu mulimba,
Uwabumbile ntanda;
E Mfumu yacindama,
E waisatuwamya.

Soseni, mwe bacemi,
Muli na mashiwi nshi?
Cinshi mwashile mpanga,
No kwisa fye kwi tanga?

“Ubushiku tumwene
Ulubuto lwa nkombe,
Shileimbile Mfumu
‘Yafyalwa mu Betlemu.”

Mwana Lesa washila,
Ukutemwa kwakula!
Mwafimine ku mwenu
Ku kutula fwe bantu.

Mufundishe na ifwe,
Tupalane na imwe;
Tube fwe ‘baicefya,
‘Ba luse, abafuka.

title: CH 67. SSS 35.
content:
Mwasho bufumu" , "Thou didst leave Thy Throne", "Mwasho bufumu
Ku mwenu ku mulu,
Pa kwishila ine pano;
Na ku Betlemu
Takwali ne nganda
Ya kuti muyefyalwamo.
Mwise mu mutima, Mfumu,
E mo mube pe mu mwenu.

‘Nkombe shashila
Shalimwimbile mwe Katula
Lelo mwafyelwe
Ngo mupina wa fye,
Mu bulanda mwalecula.
Mwise mu mutima, Mfumu,
E mo mube pe mu mwenu.

‘Nama sha calo,
‘Tuni twa mulu,
Fyakwete apa kwikala;
Na Kristu Yesu,
Mwana Lesa Mukulu,
Takwete nangu ni nganda.
Mwise mu mutima, Mfumu,
E mo mube pe mu mwenu.

Aisatwebe Landwe lisuma
Lya kulubula ababi;
Aamupata
Bamufwika ne myunga,
Bamutanika pa muti.
Mwise mu mutima, Mfumu,
Ine ku muti natemwa.

Na pa kubwela
Mu bukankala,
No mulu wamucindika,
E liyo munjite,
Na ine nyingile
Uko kwaba pa kwikala.
Nkayanga pe, Mfumu Yesu,
Nga mwantwale fi ku mwesu.

title: SSS 111.
content:
Owe, nseko! Imfumwi yi," , "Joy to the World!", "Owe, nseko! Imfumwi yi,
    Natumusengele;
Abantu bamutotele,
    ‘Ba pano nse bembe.

Owe, nseko! Mupsushi,
    Abantubebile;
Ifintu fyonse fya mweo
    Fisanswilisheko.

Owe, nseko! Aleteka
    Ne cine, cikuku;
Abena fyalo beshibe
    Ukutemwa kwakwe.

title: CH 77. SSS 25.
content:
Umfweni baleaula," , "Hark! the Glad Sound", "Umfweni baleaula,
    Katula aisa;
‘Mitima yonse imbile
    ‘kumupokelela.

Aisakakula babi,
    ‘Bakakwa ne ciwa;
‘Fikakilo aputula,
    Na fyonse fya fyela.

Aisafuma ku mulu,
    ‘Kubomba mu calo;
Na pa menso ya shampofu
    Abiko lubuto.

Aisondapa balaswa,
    ‘Bali no bulanda;
No bupe bwakwe cikuku,
    Apela bapina.

Hosana shesu, mwe Mfumu,
    Shilemucelela;
Ne nyimbo shine sha mulu
    Shilemuimbila.

title: SSH 208.
content:
‘Fya Mbetleyemu twimbile," , "O Sing of Bethlehem", "‘Fya Mbetleyemu twimbile,
    Na ‘balecemako,
Ne landwe ilyafumine
    Ku bangeli uko.
‘Lubuto lwa Mbetleyemu
    Nomba luli konse,
Lwa kufyalwa kwa kwa Yesu,
    ‘Bangeli bemba pe.

‘Fya Nasaleti twimbile,
    Ne nshiku sha nseko,
Umwaikele na nyina
    Umwaice Yesu.
Ku Nasaleti akula,
    Abo wa mutembo,
Ishina lyalilumbwike
    Mulandu wa luse.

‘Fya Ngalile natwimbile,
    ‘Cimana no mwela,
No waendele pa menshi,
    Ayatalalike.
Nelyo ifibi fya pano
    Fyaba nga mabimbi,
Mu maka yakwe twansheko
    No kubo mutende.

‘Fya Kalbale Natwimbile,
    Ne fyacitilweko,
Na uyo uwatanikwe
    Pa cimuti uko.
Pantu atufwilileko,
    No yo waimine
Ni Katula, ’Mfumu, Kristu,
    Mupusushi wine.

title: SSS 66.
content:
N’ani ulya mwi tanga" , "Who is He?", "N’ani ulya mwi tanga
‘Bantu baletotela?

      Ni Mfumu, ‘Landwe lisuma,
      ‘Mfumu mwine wa lulumbi;
      Tumuwile pa nkasa,
      Bonse bamutotele.

N’ani ulya acula,
Ali eka mu mpanga?

N’ani ulya batemwa,
‘Wa mashiwi ya luse?

N’ani ulya ondapa
‘Balwele na ‘bacula?

N’ani ulya mu mfifi
Apepa kuli Wishi?

N’ani ulya ku muti
‘Watufwila fwe babi?

N’ani ulya mu nshishi,
Nafuma? Mupusushi!

N’ani wa pa cipuna,
‘Calo conse ateka?

title: SSS 102.
content:
Wa kucula! e shina" , "Man of Sorrows", "Wa kucula! e shina
    Lya Mwana wa kwa Lesa;
Alumbwilya babipa,
    Aleluya, Mpusushi!

‘Bantu bamosoweke,
    Amfwilile ne mubi,
‘Mulopa wansumine,
    Aleluya, Mupusushi!

Twabipilwa, twabipa,
    Wene e wa kaele.
Cine, apwo kutula,
    Aleluya, Mupusushi!

Asamikwe ku kufwa,
    Akutile:”Naipwa.”
Mu mulu nomba ‘fika,
    Aleluya, Mupusushi!

Ikese Mfumu Yesu,
    ‘Kututwala ku mwesu,
Tukembila mu mulu,
    Aleluya, Mupusushi!

title: CCH 143. SSS 117.
content:
‘Milopa ya nama" , "Not all the Blood", "‘Milopa ya nama
    Ishipaiwa pe,
Te ‘ti itupyo mutende,
    Te ‘ti itusambe.

Shikulu e Mpanga
    ‘Yamfumishe fibi,
E lambo ilyacilisha
    Yonse aya kale.

Mbike minwe yandi
    Na pa mutwe wenu;
Kanjimininyo mufuke
    ‘Kuti njebelele

Namona pa numa
    ‘Fibi mwasendele,
Ni pa muti mwatanikwe,
    E ko mwamfwilile.

Mu kwitaba twanga,
    Pantu twapusuka,
Tulelumbanya Kapanga,
    Tulelumuimbila.

title: SSS 630.
content:
Cine Yesu anculile," , "Alas! And my Saviour", "Cine Yesu anculile,
   ‘Mfumu yamfwilile;
Mutwe wakwe wandashilwe
   Ine muntu mubi.

Ni pa mpulumushi shandi
   Atetele kale;
Ku lupanda kwamoneke
   Ubwingi bwa luse.

‘Lintu Kristu Shakapanga
   Afwililya bantu,
‘Kasuba takamoneke,
   Takabalike ‘yo.

‘Filamba fyandi fyacepa
   Ubupe ku Mfumu;
Kuli imwe ndeipela,
   E co ndecita fye.

title: CH 725. SSS 1134.
content:
Kulyu mulundu kutali" , "There is a Green Hill", "Kulyu mulundu kutali
    Ku nse ya musumba,
Kuntu Yeswa tufwilile
    ‘Kuti tupusuke.

Tatwishibe ubulanda,
    Te kuti tulande,
Lelo iwe twasumina
    Ni ‘fwe aculile.

Afwilyo kuti twelelwe,
    ‘Kuti tupusuke,
‘Kuti tupelwe ubumi,
    Tutwalwe ku mulu.

Tapali muntu umbi ‘yo
    Wa kutulubula;
Yesu eka e wa maka
    Kutwiswilo mulu.

E Yesu atutemwisha,
    ‘Fwe tumutemwishe,
Tucetekele mfwa yakwe,
    Tumutumikile.

title: CH 112. SSS 115.
content:
Pa kulolesha lupnda" , "When I Survey", "Pa kulolesha lupnda
     Ukwe Mfumu yamfwilile,
‘Fyuma fyandi kanshi fya fye,
     Ne cilumba na co capwa.

Te ‘ti ntakishishe kumbi
     Kano mu mfwa ya kwa Yesu;
Fyonse fya fye fyo natemwa
     Ndeposa pa mulopa yu.

Ku nkasa, maboko, mutwe,
     Umulopa ulesuma;
Mwabo bulanda no luse
     ‘Fishabala ‘fimoneka.

Ifyalo fyonse nga fyandi,
     Kuti ‘mulambo wacepa;
‘Luse ulu lulefwaya
     ‘Mutima wandi no mweo.

title: CH 140.
content:
Yesu, balimusulile," , "Hail Thou once Despised Jesus", "Yesu, balimusulile,
    ‘Mfumu ya ku Ngalile,
Mwaculile tupusuke,
    Ni ‘mwe mwatulubwile.
Mwe Katula wa bucushi,
    Mwasende nsoni shesu,
Muli imwe twalishuka,
    ‘Shina lyenu lya mweo.

E lambo Lesa ‘lisonta
    ‘Fibi fyesu kusenda.
Luse e lwamutumine
    ‘Wa kutuwikishanya.
‘Bantu benu baelelwa
    ‘Mulandu wa mulopa,
Icipata caisulwa
    ‘Kuti bonse bengile.

Yesu muli mu lulumbi
    Ukwikalilila pe;
Abengeli bamutasha
    Ku cipuna kwa Shinwe.
Uko muletulombela,
    E cifulo twapelwa,
Pe fye muletupepela
    Tukasukya tufika.

‘Mucinshu, lulumbya, maka,
    Fyafulisha tupele;
Amalumbo yashakapwe
    Twawaminwo kuleta.
Muletwafwa, mwe bangeli,
    Ne nyimbo shawamisha;
Twimbile Umupusushi,
    Tulumbanye ‘Manyule.

title: SSS 134.
content:
Yesu ni ku Kalble" , "Jesus, keep me near", "Yesu ni ku Kalble
    Ndefwayo kwikala,
‘Kuti njishibe fyonse
    Ifya luse lwenu.

        Kalbale, Kabale,
            E ku mutima wandi,
        Ine nsangweko pe,
            E ku mweo wandi.

E ko atula babi,
    Bamonako bumi;
E ko balesekela,
    No bumi bapelwa.

Pa kwisa kwa kwa Kristu
    E ko tukasangwa,
Na mu mulu mwa Lesa
    Kalbale tukemba.

title: CH 123.
content:
‘Bututubuko ubu!" , "The Day of Resurrection", "‘Bututubuko ubu!
   Sabankanyeni mwe;
E Paska lya buseko,
   ‘Paska lya kwa Lesa.
Atufumishe ku mfwa,
   ‘Kunina ku mulu,
Kristu weswa tufisha
   Ne nyimbo sha mweo.

Tufumye fibi fyesu,
   Katumone bwino,
Imfumu ya lulumbi
   No lubuto lwa pe;
No kumfwe shiwi lyakwe,
   Lya luse, lya maka,
Atusosho mutende,
   Twimbyo ulu.

Mwe ba mu mulwi mbeni,
   Na bonse mu calo,
Ulwimbo lwa batulwa,
   Ku Mfumu ya mweo;
Ifintu fyakwe fyonse
   Fisansha mashiwi,
Pantu Kristu alima
   Tube ne nseko pe.

title: CH 121. SSS 158.
content:
Kristu naima lelo," , "Christ the Lord", "Kristu naima lelo,
   Aleluya.
‘Bangeli, ‘bantu basosa,
   Aleluya.
Imbeni nyimbo shenu,
   Aleluya,
‘Ba mu calwa ba mu mulu,
   Aleluya.

Napwe milimo ya luse
Pa bantu, bapusushiwe,
Nalwila bantu bonse,
Nansha fyonse fya mu buta.

‘Libwe lya pa mwinshi pene,
Alifumishepo eka,
Te ‘ti mfwa ituleshe,
Naisule Mpaladise.

Naikele Mfumu yesu,
We mfwa ni kwi maka yobe?
Afwile atutule;
‘Cilindi te ‘ti citwanshe.

Nomba Yesu tumukonke,
Aletungulula ifwe;
Kuli wene twabumbwa,
Na wene e ukatwimya.

Celeleni Mfumu yesu,
Ya calo, ya mu mulu;
Twacelela mwe Kansha,
Ni mwe Bututubuko.

title: CH 122.
content:
Yesu alimine," , "Jesus Lives!", "Yesu alimine,
    Imfwa te ‘ti itutinye,
E mo naishibila
    Yesu akamfumya mu mfwa.
        Aleluya.

Yesu alimine,
    Pa cipuna naikala;
Nalakonko ko ali,
    Pamo nankwe ku kwikala.
        Aleluya.

Yesu alimine,
    Uyo winyo wamfwilile;
Nakulamubombela,
    No kumulumbanya pe pe.
        Aleluya.

Yesu aliimine,
    Nangu mweo nangu ni mfwa
Te ‘ti fitupatule
    Ku kutemwa kwa kwa Lesa.
        Aleluya.

Yesu alimine,
    Te ‘ti ntine nelyo kamo;
Imfwa nomba e mwinshi
    Wa kwingilila ku mweo.
        Aleluya.

title: SSS 152.
content:
Mu nshishi allele," , "Low in the Grave He Lay", "Mu nshishi allele,
   Yesu Katula,
‘Kulindilo kuca,
   ‘Mfumu yandi.

   Mu nshishi alima,
   Ayanshisha balwani bonse,
   Alima Katula, ‘kututulako,
   Nomba pa cipuna
   Aba na Lesa;
   Alima, alima,
   Aleluya, alima.

Kwa fye balindile,
   Yesu Katula;
Kwa fye bafungile
   ‘Mfumu yandi.

'Mfwa tayamwikete,
   Yesu Katula;
Wene ayanshishe,
   ‘Mfumu yandi.

title: CH 127. SSS 153.
content:
Aleluya! Aleluya!" , "Aleluya! Aleluya!", "Aleluya! Aleluya!
Twayawila ku mulu;
Imbileni kuli Lesa,
Imbileni ne nseko.
Uwafwile ku lupanda,
Alubwilya ba pano;
Yesu Mfumu ya lulumbi
Alimine ku bafwa.

Aleluya! Aleluya!
Aliimine Kristu;
E cisabo ica ntanshi
Ca fyonse fya kusabwa.
E lya bena mwakwe bonse
Bakemiwe fyo fine,
Bakalonganikwa bonse
Kumo nankwe pe na pe.

Aleluya! Aleluya!
Ululumbi ku mulu;
Twaimbilo Mupusushi,
Uwayansho bwansho.
Aleluya kuli Lesa,
Aleluya ku Mwana,
Aleluya ku Mupashi,
Aleluya pe na pe.

title: SSS 146.
content:
Owe! Ukwima kulipo," , "Jesus is Risen", "Owe! Ukwima kulipo,
    ‘Buseko, mutende;
Owe, ilibwe tapali,
    Ininga ili fye.

        Yesu alime fyasosa,
        Alima mu mfwa ye lindi,
        Sekela, imbila ukwima,
        Yesu alimo Mupusushi.

He, he! Insalu sha mufwe,
    Nashifungwa bwino;
He, he! Ininga ili fye,
    Yesu e talimo.

Yangu! Aenda pano nse,
    Namba talecla;
Yangu! Ulumbi lwakwe,
    Konse lwalumbuka.

Mona! Kulipo Ukwima,
    Ne nyimbo ne shiwi;
Mona! ukwansha kwa Mfumu
    Kwaleta ubupe.

title: CH 126.
content:
Aleluya! Aleluya!" , "The Strife is O’er", "Aleluya! Aleluya!
                 Aleluya!

‘Kulwa kwapwa no kucula
‘Mpalume yesu yalyansha,
No lwa kucimfya lwaimbwa;
    Aleluya!

Amaka ya mfwa yafilwa,
Pantu Kristu ayonaula,
Natwimbe sha kutotela.
    Aleluya!

‘Nshiku shitatu shapita,
Aima Mumi ku bafwa,
Alumbwe ku ciyayaya.
    Aleluya!

Afune fyela fya ku mbo,
Aponya yonse milando,
Embilwe pe ne sho nyimbo.
    Aleluya!

Mwe Mfumu mwaliculishe,
Ku mfwa mwalifumishe,
Natwikale tumwibile.
    Aleluya!

title: CH 142. SSS 141.
content:
Uwafwikilwe imyuga," , "The Head that once was Crowned", "Uwafwikilwe imyuga,
    Nomba alumbuka,
‘Citebo cakwe cisuma
    Nacimusamika.

Ciifulo cakwe ku mulu
    Cili cakwe ceka,
‘Mfumu ya shamfumu shonse,
    ‘Lubuto ulwa pe.

Buseko bwa ba mu mulu,
    Pamo na ba pa nshi.
Abasokolwelwo luse
    Lwakwe lukalamba.

E bo bapelwo lupanda
    Balusende nomba;
Lilya bakakwate shina
    No buseko bwa pe.

Baculile Mfumu pa nshi.
    Ku mulu bateka;
E bo bapelwo kwishiba
    ‘Kutemwa kwakwe pe.

‘Lupanda kuli fwe bumi,
    Ni mfwa kulu Yesu,
‘Bucetekelo bwa bantu,
    ‘Landwe lyabo lya pe.

title: CH 133.
content:
Ulucelo twasengela lusuma," , "Welcome Happy Morning", "Ulucelo twasengela lusuma,
Ku Mbo kwalyanshiwa, ‘mulu wanonkwa.
Ye, Umufwe Mumi ! Les ape na pe,
Wene e kalenga wa fintu fyonse.
Ulucelo twasengela lusuma.

Calo ca buseko, cafwikwa bwino,
‘Fintu filebwelapamo ne Mfumu,
‘Maluba ku nika, ‘miti yalemba,
Filetwebe fyo bulanda nabupwa.
Ku Mbo kwalyanshiwa, ‘mulu wanonkwa.

Imyeshi ipita ne nshiku pamo,
No tushita tumwimbila no lwimbo,
‘Kubuta ‘po bwaca, no kwa kasuba
Kwandulule mfifi, kumutotela.
Ulucelo twasengela lusuma.

Mwe kalubula,Kalenga wa mweo,
Mwamone fyabipa ifya mu fyalo.
Bulesa ni ‘mwe, no Mwana wa cine,
Mwafwelepo buntu ‘kuti butulwe.
Ku Mbo kwalyanshiwa, ‘mulu wanonkwa.

     Mwe Ntulo ya mweo, imwe mwafwile,
Mwali mu mfifi ‘kuti tutulwe.
Iseni Ba cine, nomba imeni,
Bwa citatu ukufuma mu nshishi.
Ulucelo twasengela lusuma.

Funguleni abakakwa ne Ciwa,
Bonse abawile mwimye, Katula,
Inuneni mpumi, ‘ndupwa shimone,
Muletyo lubuto, lutubutishe.
Ku Mbo kwaliyanshiwa, ‘mulu wanonkwa.

title: CH 723.
content:
‘Lulumbi no muchinshi" , "All Glory and Honour", "‘Lulumbi no muchinshi
   Fibe Kuli imwe,
Mwe baumfwilyo lwimbo
   Lwa bana banono.
Ni ‘mwe Mwana Dabidi,
   ‘Mfumu ya Israel;
Mwi shina lya kwa Lesa
   E mo mwaishila.

Ibumba lya bangeli
   Balemulumbanya.
Na bantu ba pano nse
   Basuka ”Hosana”.
AbaHebre kale
   Balimusefeshe;
Ne fwe twamulumbanya,
   Twapepa kuli ‘mwe.

Ilyo tamulacula
   Balimulumbenye;
Nomba mwaimishiwa
   Twacite fyo fine.
Na nomba kuli ifwe
   Pokenya mapepo.

’Lulumbi no mucinshi
   Fibe kuli imwe,
Mwe baufwilyo lwimbo
   Lwa bana banono. Amen.

title: CH 433. SSS 695.
content:
Ni Mwana Lesa aleya" , "The Son of God", "Ni Mwana Lesa aleya
    Ku kulwa ne Ciwa;
Uluungu lulepupa,
    N’ani ulekonka?
Winganwako ulukombo
    Lwa kuculacula?
Untu asendo lupanda
    Wene alekonka.

Impuka ya ‘bwa basalwa,
    Bali no mupashi,
Baishibe Shikulwibo,
    Tabali no mwenso.
Bakumenye umulwani,
    No kwensha ifyabipa;
‘Kufika ku mfwa balelwa;
    N’ani ulekonka.

Abaume na baice
    Nabafwikwa tutu,
Bamayo na bakashana,
    Baanga kwa Yesu.
Balenina ulupili
    Lwa kuculacula:
Mwe Lesa, ifwe tukonke
    Mu mulongo wabo.

title: CH 61. SSS 515.
content:
‘Lintu nakutumanina" , "When All Thy Mercies", "‘Lintu nakutumanina
   Mu bupalo bwenu,
Fyansekesha pakalamba,
   Nafilwo kutasha.

Ilyo nail umwaice
   Mu nshile shayafya,
Mwalengafwilisha lyonse,
   Nangwi lyo nshishibe.

Ilyo nalwelyo bulwele
   E ilyo mwamposeshe;
Ilintu namubifishe,
   Mwalinjelele fye.

Pa makana na makana
   Ya bupe natota;
Nabupoka no kutasha,
   Nakulatotela.

Mu nshita shonse sha mweo,
   Nakulamukonka;
Na kulya kwine ku mwenu
   Nkalamulumbanya.

Mu nshita sha ciyayaya,
   Nkalamuimbila;
Awe nshita ya cepa ya
   Kumulumbanisha.

title: CH 479.
content:
‘Mfula na kasuba fyonse" , "He Sendeth Sun", "‘Mfula na kasuba fyonse
Fyafwaikwa ku maluba;
Ni ‘fyo Lesa atukusha
Ku buseko no bulanda.

       Muli fyonse ‘fimponena,
       ‘Kufwaya kwenu kucitwe.

Bushe abana bangwinte
‘Bafyashi abo batemwa? 
Ni ‘fyo tata, muleke mbe
Umwana wacetekelwa.

Nomba te’ti ngwingwintike
‘Mulandu wa fya pano nse;
Mu cinshingwa ca mfwa na mo
Mwimbile ncili ndepema.

title: CH 43.
content:
Pa busuma bwa calo," , "For the Beauty of the Earth", "Pa busuma bwa calo,
Pa busuma bwa mulu,
Pa mulandu wa luse
Ululi konse konse:

        Shifwe kuli ‘mwe lelo
        Twimbyo lwimbo lwa nseko.

Pa busuma bwa nshita
Sha bushiku ‘kasuba,
Bwa mpili na manika,
Bwa miti na maluba:

Pa bupe bwa kutemwa
Kwa bafyashi na bana,
‘Fibusa fya pano nse
Ifitwafwa mu luse:

Pa mulandu wa bupe
Mutupela pano nse,
Fyonse ifituntulu,
Nga maluba ya mulu:

Pa Cilonganinwe ci,
Icipepa kuli ‘mwe,
Cili mu fyalo fyonse,
Cakulamutasha pe:

title: CH 325.
content:
Umfweni ulo ulwimbo" , "Hark! the Sound of Jubilee", "Umfweni ulo ulwimbo
Lwa ciunda nge nkuba;
No kupoma nga bemba
Ilyo aima maba;
Aleluya! Shikulu
Lesa eka ateka;
Aleluya! Ishiwi
Liye lifike konse.

Aleluya! Umfweni
Umulu na pano nse
Fyasukana mu lwimbo
Lwa kutotele Mfumu.
Lesa nafungo lunga,
Nasomeka lupanga,
Nomba ‘pelo bufumu
Bonse ku Mwana wakwe.

Wene akulateka
Konse konse pano nse;
Na lyo line ‘ kuteka
Nelyo mulu wapita;
Na ku mpelelekesho
Umulwani akawa.
Aleluya! Kristu
Umo na Lesa Wishi.

title: CH 212. SSS 228.
content:
‘Cilonganino caba" , "The Church's One Foundation", "‘Cilonganino caba
   Pali Yesu Kristu,
Cabe cilengo cipya
   Ce shiwi na menshi;
Aishilecifwaya
   Ukuba nabwinga,
Cashitwa no mulopa,
   Alicifwilile.

Baitwa bena fyalo
   Ku kufyalwa cipya,
‘Bucetekelo bumo
   Ne Mfumu imo fye;
Citashe shina limo,
   ‘Cilyo cimo cilia,
Ubusubilo bumo
   E bo cakwatisha.

Mu kukakala konse,
   Pamo na mu bulwi,
Cilindilo mutende
   Uwa ciyayaya;
‘Lintu ifya lulumbi
   Fikesamoneka,
E lyo cilonganino
   Cikalatushisha.

Calundana pano nse
   Na Lesa patatu,
Cilomfwana na balya
   Abaletusho ko.
Angeni, mwe bashila!
   Mwe Mfumu tupeni
Pamo na ‘bwa bafuka
   Tukekale ne mwe.

title: CH 153.
content:
Mwe Katula wesu" , "Saviour, Blessed Saviour", "Mwe Katula wesu
    Sh’umfweni twimbe;
Na mashiwi yesu
    Tumulumbanye.
Fyonse fyo twakwata,
    Ne fyo tukaba,
‘Mbili, mitima,
    Twamupa lelo.

Twali ukutali
    Na ku lupanda,
Tatwasakamene
    Nangu panono.
E lyo mwaishile
    Mu kutufwaya;
Mwalitubwekesha
    Kwi cinka lilya.

Katupalamishe
    Mupepi pepi;
No kufukamisha
    Pa kucelela.
Na pa kututla
    Mwaishilefwa;
Mwaile ku mulu
    ‘Kuti tukonke.

Ifya luse fyenu
    Fyalifulisha;
No bupanda bwenu
    Bwabo bwa cine.
Takuli bulanda,
    Nelyo cikonko,
Uko abangeli
    Bamwimbila pe.

Nomba akasuba
    Kaya ku kuwa,
Kalebalikila
    Pa fyo twabomba.
Yaswa ipwe nshita,
    Kucula kupwa;
E lyo, mwe Katula,
    Tukayatusha.
Tuye lwa ku ntanshi
    Mu lwendo lwesu
Nga bashilishiwa
    ‘Bali kwa Yesu.
‘kushe fya pano nse
    Natucincile,
Twiceba ku numa
    Kano tufike.

title: CH 351. SSS 216.
content:
Naumfwile Yesu ati:" , "I Heard the Voice of Jesus", "Naumfwile Yesu ati:
“’So tushe kuli’ne;
Laliko mutwe, we wandi,
    Pa cifuba candi.”
Naitebe kuli Yesu,
    Ni’ne wa bulanda,
Nasangapwa pa kutusha,
    Na o ansekesha.

Naumfwile Yesu ati:
    “Mona ndekupa fye
‘Menshi ya bumi, we mwana,
    Nwa, ube no mweo.”
Naitebe kuli Yesu,
    Amenshi nanwene,
‘Cilaka caliputwike,
    Naba muli wene.

Naumfwile Yesu ati;
    “Ndi nyali ya calo,
Mona kuli ‘ne ukuca
    Kwa nshiku, ‘lubuto”
Naitebe kuli Yesu,
    ‘Lutanda, Kasuba,
Na mu lubuto ndendamo
    Shisuke ndo shipwe.

title: CH 343. SSS 374.
content:
“Iso ko ndi, Wanaka," , "“Come unto Me”", "“Iso ko ndi, Wanaka,
    Ndekupo butusho.”
E shiwilya kwa Yesu,
    Ku bakungumana.
Lyatwebe fya mutende,
    ‘Cikuku ne nseko,
No luse, e na fyonse
    Ifishakapweko.

“Iso ko ndi, we mwana,
    Ndekupo lubuto.”
E shiwi lya kwa Yesu,
    ‘Lyaisa ne nseko.
‘Mitima yalifina,
    Twaluba mu nshila;
‘Bushiku natulosha,
    Bwaca twasekela.

“Iso ko ndi, we wafwa,
    Nalakupo mweo.”
E shiwi lya kwa Yesu,
    ‘Lyaisatwafwako;
‘Mulwani alikosa,
    Ukulwa kwabipa,
Lelo watupa maka,
    Ne fwe tukamwansha.

“Na uyo uleisa,
    Te’ti mutamfye ‘yo.”
E shiwi lya kwa Yesu
    Ilitamfyo mwenso.
Liletwita fwe babi
    Fwe bashawamina,
Uluse lukalamba,
    Tufike kuli ‘mwe.

title: CH 314.
content:
Natucelele Mfumu," , "Hail to the Lord's Anointed", "Natucelele Mfumu,
    ‘Mwana wa kwa Lesa;
Yafumine ku mulu,
    Pa calo ‘kuteka.
Aisaono busha,
    ‘Kukakula nkole,
‘Kufumye fyabipisha,
    ‘Kuteka mu cine.

Akesa nge fye mfula
    Iloka pa calo:
‘Buseko no kutemwa
    E fikamenamo.
‘Kutangilile ntanshi
    ‘Mutende uleya;
No bololoke bwine
    Pa numa bwakonka.

Shikamuwile mfumu,
    Shikaleto bupe;
‘Ndupwa shikatotela
    Shikalamwimbila.
Pantu akalateka
    Mu fyalo ne fyalo;
Konse uko kapumpe
    Engapupukila.

Bonse bakamupepa,
    ‘Nshiku ne nshiku pe,
‘Bufumu bukakula,
    Te kuti bukapwe.
Awe tacakaluke
    ‘Cipingo cakwe ci;
Likalabelelela
    Ishina lya Luse.

title: CH 204.
content:
Shiwi lyaikala," , "Lord Thy Word Abideth", "Shiwi lyaikala,
Litutungulula;
Untu asumina,
‘Buseko apelwa.

Nga babi baliko,
Litupelo buseko;
Litusansamusha,
Lilatupususha.

‘Lyo bulanda bwisa,
Na ifwe twatunkwa,
Lilatufundisha,
Litubakilila.

Uwishibe n’ani
Ubuseko bwe Shiwi,
Buntu tulepelwa,
Fwe balesumina?

‘Fwe kuti twishibe
Fyonse litufundisha,
‘Kuti tumutemwe,
No kwikala ne mwe.

Ishiwi lya luse
Lyafwa aba mweo;
Ishiwi lya mweo
Lyafwa abalefwa.

title: CH 282. SSS 285.
content:
Ni ‘mwe Buseko bwa bantu" , "Jesus Thou Joy of Loving Hearts", "Ni ‘mwe Buseko bwa bantu
   Abatemwa shina lyenu.
Mwe Yesu, Ntulo ya mweo,
   Twapilibuka ku calo.

‘Cine cenu ca pe na pe,
   Matula bonsha bamwita;
Ku bamusanga, Wa luse,
   Ku bamufwaya, Musuma.

Twamusonda, mwe Fya kulya,
   Twafwayo kulye nshiku pe;
Twanwa, mwe Kafukauka,
   ‘Cilaka naciputuka.

‘Mitima yamufuluka,
   Konse uko twaikala;
Twaanga nga ‘tusekela,
   Twatemwa nga tuli nankwe.

Mwe Yesu, mube ne fwe pe,
   Twikale pe umutende;
Mutamfye mfifi ya fibi,
   ‘Lubuto mubengeshimye.

title: CH 491. SSS 762.
content:
Yesu Mfumu aletwita" , "Jesus Calls Us", "Yesu Mfumu aletwita
    Muno calo cabipa,
Tuleumfwe shiwi lyakwe:
    “Konka ine nshiku pe.”

Yesu Kristu aletwita,
    Nelyo tuletotela
‘Fintu fya fye fya mu calo:
    “Ulentemwo kucila.”

Mu buseko, mu bulanda,
    Mu kutasha, mu ncito,
‘Nshiku shonse aletwita:
    “Mwana wandi untemwe.”

Aletwita muli fyonse;
    Mwe Mfumu natumfwisha;
Twasumina mu mitima
    ‘Kumutemwo kucila.

title: CH 368. SSS 237.
content:
Mwe Cilibwe ca kale," , "Rock of Ages", "Mwe Cilibwe ca kale,
Kamfisame muli ‘mwe;
Umulopa na menshi
Fyasumine kuli ‘mwe,
E kundapwa kwa fibi,
Nsangululwe, muntule.

Nelyo kamo nshikwete,
‘Lupanda njikata fye;
Mumfwike ndi no bwamba,
Ngafwa ne mbulwa maka.
Nomba njise, nimbipa,
Munsambe nikesafwa.

‘Milimo ya ku minwe,
Te’ti ‘citya mafunde;
‘Mukosha nga taupwa,
‘Filamba filepona;
Te’ti ifi fintule,
Muntule mweka imwe.

‘Lintu nkaleko mweo,
Yakashibata menso;
Nkamono ko mwikele
Pa cipuna ca cilye.
Mwe Cilibwe ca kale,
Kamfisame muli ‘mwe.

title: SSS 904.
content:
Takuli Kafwa nga Yesu Kristu," , "There's Not a Friend", "Takuli Kafwa nga Yesu Kristu,
    Takuli, nakalya,
Takuli umbi wingatutula,
    Takuli, nakalya.

        Yesu atwishiba fwe bonse,
        Akatufisha kwi shilya,
        Takuli kafwa nga Yesu Kristu,
        Takuli, nakalya.

Takuli wa mushilo nga Yesu,
No bufuke bwa kucila ngo bu.

Tapali nshita ashiba ne fwe,
Nangwa kasuba nangu bushiku.

Ni nshita nshi alulilya bakwe?
Nangu kutamfyo mupulumushi?

Bushe kulyu bupe bumbi ngo bu?
N’ani afwilyo kukana Yesu?

title: CH 320. SSS 1084.
content:
Yesu wene aleteka" , "Jesus Shall Reign", "Yesu wene aleteka
Konsha kasuba katula;
‘Bufumu te ‘ti bukapwe
‘Mweshi usuke ukapwe.

Bakalamupepa bonse,
Bakalamulumbanya pe;
‘Shina lyakwe lyatemwikwa,
Pa bushiku na kasuba.

Abantu ba ndimi shonse
Bamutemwe, bamwimbile;
Na mu mapepwa banono
Bakalalombo bupalo.

Abatekwa bakashuka,
Abafungwa bafungulwa,
Abanaka bakatusha,
Aba nsala bakekuta.

Mulete bonse, mwe bantu,
‘Mucinshu, luse ku Mfumu;
‘Bangeli beke no lwimbo,
Pamo na ba muno calo.

title: SSS 539.
content:
‘Mfumu Yesu e Cilibwe" , "The Lord's Our Rock", "‘Mfumu Yesu e Cilibwe
‘Mwa kufisama ku nkunta;
Twashuka nangu ni mu mfwa,
‘Mwa kufisama ku nkunta.

    Ni Yesu e Cilibwe muno Lwendo
    Nga twanaka, nga twanaka.
    Ni Yesu e Cilibwe muno  lwendo,
    ‘Mwa kufisama ku nkunta.

‘Cubwa kasuba, ‘bushiku,
Te ‘ti tutinya balwani.

Nge fipupu fyatwimina,
Twakanafumo mo twaba.

Mwe Cilibwe, Mupusushi,
Mutwafwe nshiku shonse pe.

title: SSS 65.
content:
Yesu atutemwa bonse," , "One there is above all Others", "Yesu atutemwa bonse,
   Atemwa pe.
‘Nshiku shonse aba ne fwe,
   Atemwa pe.
Yesu atutungulula,
Na mu nshila tukaluba
Nga tatulepalamina.
   Atemwa pe.

Yesu atupelo bumi,
   Atemwa pe.
Mu mitima twamutemwa,
   Atemwa pe.
Atushite no mulopa,
Aishiletulondola
Uko twali mu kuluba.
   Atemwa pe.

Alisende mpulumushi,
   Atemwa pe.
Akatutwala ku mulu,
   Atemwa pe.
Akalatwafwa na maka,
Atucincintilile mfwa
Na balwanya ba mu nshila.
   Atemwa pe.

title: CH 165.
content:
Yesu pe fye mwabapo," , "O Jesus ever Present", "Yesu pe fye mwabapo,
    Kacema musuma;
‘Shina lyenu lyabila
    Mu mitima yesu.

Twatemenwe shine li
    ‘Lyo twalya baice;
Mu bukalamba pamo
    E Cuma tukwete.

‘Lingi ku bonaushi
    Nga twafikileko,
Amubulaba ne fwe,
    Mwe Katula wesu.

Ilingi na mu mfifi,
    Nga twaliwilemo,
Lelo mwatwimishe,
    E, mwatuposeshe.

Mwe Kacema musuma,
    Twamucetekela;
Ni mwe mulatulisha,
    Mutwimya nga twawa.

‘Shiwi lyenu lya maka
    Mu mfwa tukalyumfwa;
Mukatufishe bonse
    Kwi cinka ku mwenu.

title: CH 55. SSS 514.
content:
Mwe Lesa wa ku Betele," , "O God of Bethel", "Mwe Lesa wa ku Betele,
Mwe batulisha pe,
Ni ‘mwe mwaletungulula
‘Bantu benu kale.

Natufukama kuli ‘mwe
No kumupapata;
Mwe Lesa wa kwa Abramu,
Mube Lesa wesu.

Mu nshiku shesu shonse fye
Tutungululeni ;
Mukaletupela filyo,
Ne fifwalo fyesu.

Mutubake, twapapata,
Shisuke ndo shipwe;
Kabinge mulya mwa Shifwe
Tukabelelela.

Ubu bupalo twalomba,
E bo twafwaisha,
Mube Lesa wesu nomba,
‘Cuma cesu ca pe.

title: CH 390. SSS 14.
content:
We fibi fuma," , "Begone Unbelief", "We fibi fuma,
    Katula ‘lipo.
Tukakokole
    Ukwisantula.
Ine ndepepa fye,
    Wenya langafwa,
Nga tuli na Kristu
    Nasule nkuntu.

Ilyo pafita
    E Cilongoshi;
Candi kukonka,
    Cakwe kumbaka.
Nga takuli menshi,
    ‘Bantu bandula,
‘Shiwi asosele
    Akalifisha.

Luse lwa kale
E cishibilo,
    Te ‘ti andeke
 ‘Kutotobela.
Ifya Ebenesa
    Ninjibukisha,
Finengo kwishiba
    Akulangafwa.

Te kuti ngwinte
    Ifimponena,
Ifya kwafye fi
    Anjeba kale.
Bonsha bakamona
    Ubupususho,
Mu malanda yengi
    Bakonke Mfumu.

‘Fya mu lukombo
    Ifyo anwene,
Fya kulula mwe!
    Te ‘ti tulande.
Inshila yayafya
    Umwa twendele!
Wene alecula,
    Bushe ifwe ‘yo?

Fyonse nkumanya
    Filemombela;
Kanshi ‘fyalula
    Fyabe fyalowa.
Kwene nshita ino
    Filetucusha,
Lelo nga twayansha
    Tukalateka.

title: (Tune: Nettleton)
content:
Yesu kale amfwaile," , "Come Thou Fount", "Yesu kale amfwaile,
Nalyu mweni kutali;
Pa kuntula aposele
‘Mweo wakwe pali ‘ne.

    Namutemwa, Aleluya,
    Namutemwa ‘Mupusushi,
    Namutemwa Yesu Kristu,
    Amfwilile pa Kalbale.

Yesu nomba alefwaya
‘Kuti nkonke nshiku pe
Mu makasa yakwo mwine
‘Mwaendele pano nse.

Yesu mwine akabwela
‘Kututwala ku mwakwe;
E mo tukalasekela
Mu musumba wakwe pe.

title: SSS 75.
content:
Afumine ku mulu," , "Who Came down from Heaven", "Afumine ku mulu,
    Yesu Mupusushi,
Aishile ngo muntu,
    Yesu Mupusushi.

        Imbeni ulwimbo lu,
        Ebeni bonsha bantu,
        Afumine ku mulu,
        Yesu Mupusushi.

Afwilile pa muti,
Ku kutula na ine.

Mu mulu abe Mfumu,
 Tunakile, tutemwe.

Ku mulu akekila,
‘Kututwala ku mwakwe.

title: SSS 89.
content:
Shinganga ali mupepi," , "The Great Physician", "Shinganga ali mupepi,
‘Shina lyakwe ni Yesu;
Atubelele uluse,
Umfwe shiwi, ni Yesu.

     Bula ulwimbo lusuma,
     Lwe shina lya kwa Yesu;
     Atubelele uluse,
     Umfwe shiwi, ni Yesu.

Impulumushi shelelwa
Pe shina lya kwa Yesu;
Enda mu nshila ku mulu
‘Kwikala pe na Yesu.

Lyafumye fibi no mwenso,
Ishina lya kwa Yesu;
Natemwe shina lya Mfumu,
Natemwe Mfumu Yesu.

Twimbe bonse tulumbanye
Ishina lya kwa Yesu;
Tusumine landwe lyakwe,
‘Landwe lya Bupususho.

‘Lyo tukafika ku mulu
Tukamumona Yesu.
Tukamwimbilo lwimbo lu
Lwe shina lya kwa Yesu.

title: SSS 686.
content:
Imbileni Yesu" , "Sing a Hymn to Jesus", "Imbileni Yesu
    Nga mwasusuka;
Muleeba Yesu
    ‘Bulanda bwenu.
Nga yayafye ncito,
    ‘Nshila yalepa,
Nga mwatina cimo,
    Mweba mu kwimba.
‘Mutimo fuluka
    ‘Ngala ya mweo;
Isansamusheni
    Pa kwimbo lwimbo.

Tuli ba pano nse,
    ‘Mwe ba ku mulu,
Ifwe tuli babi,
    Mwabuta tutu.
Tuli ba kwaluka,
    Tamwaluka ‘yo,
‘Buseko bufuma
    Mwi shina lyenu.
Imbileni Yesu,
    Nga mwasusuka;
Muleeba Yesu
    ‘Bulanda bwenu.

Intulo ni Yesu
    Ya fintu fyonse,
Na bulesa bonse
    Bwaikalamo.
Ndenina ukwali,
    Pa kumulumba;
No bushiku bwandi
    Bwaca no kuca.
Nyimba kuli Yesu
    ‘Bualnda bwandi.

Yesu ndefwaisha
    ‘kumutemwa pe,
Bushe ndete shani
    ‘Bupe kuli ‘mwe?
E nalimutemwa,
    Mwise muli ‘ne,
E lyo mukasende
    ‘Kuba na imwe.
Nyimba kuli Yesu
    ‘Bulanda bwandi.

title: CH 190. SSS 189.
content:
Mwise mwe Mupashi, mwise," , "Come Holy Ghost", "Mwise mwe Mupashi, mwise,
    Tumfwa maka yenu,
Intulo ya fintu fyonse,
    Ya luse, ‘lubuto.

Mwe Mupashi, muli imwe
    ‘Nkombe shashimike,
Tulangwe cine ca Mwine
    Ca mwi Buku ili.

Mwe Mupashi wa ku mulu,
    Tufukatileni,
Muwamye mitima yesu,
    ‘Lubuto lwingile.

Mwe Lesa twalamwishiba
    Nga mwaba muli ‘fwe,
Mu calo twakulaumfwa 
    Amaka no luse.

title: CH 181. SSS 191.
content:
'Lintu Yeswa shalikepo" , "Our Blest Redeemer", "'Lintu Yeswa shalikepo
   Abasambi bakwe,
Kasansamusha apele
   ‘Kuba ne fwe.

Aishiletusangulula,
   Tube ba cikuku;
Afwayafwaye mitima
   ‘Mwa kwikala.

E shiwi lyakwe twaumfwa,
   Liletupelesha,
Lyaleshe fibi, lyatwebe
   Fya kwa Lesa.

‘Cikuku cintu twakwata,
   ‘Kwansha kwesu konse,
Ne fisuma fya mitima,
   Fili fyakwe.

Mwe Mupashi uwa bupe,
   Mube pali ifwe,
Mwikale muli ‘fwe benu
   Mu mitima.

title: CH 189. SSS 323.
content:
Mwe Lesa Mupashi," , "Lord God the Holy Ghost", "Mwe Lesa Mupashi,
    Mu nshite yi ine,
Pamo nga pali Pentekost,
    Mwingile na maka.

Twalongana kuno,
    Mu cifulo cenu,
‘Kulindililo bulayo,
    Mupashi wa luse.

Mwise nge cipupu,
    Mututenshe bonse,
Tube no mutima umo,
    Mu bufwayo bwenu.

Mukosha baice,
    Na bakote pamo
Bapelwe ndimi shanguka
    Sha kumutotela.

Mupashi lubuto,
    Mufumye imfifi,
Mubengeshime pali ‘fwe,
    Bukaco busuma.

Mupashi wa cine,
    Mube ntungulushi,
Mu mweo nangu ni mu mfwa,
    Tusuke tufike.

title: CH 196. SSS 201.
content:
Mwe Mupashi muletwafwa," , "Spirit Divine", "Mwe Mupashi muletwafwa,
    Muno nganda yenu,
Mwike no luse, na maka,
    Mwise mwe Mupashi.

Mwise nge fintu lubuto
    Lutusokola.
Tutungululwe mu nshila
    Ya baololoka.

Mwise ngo mulilo,
    ‘Koco Bubi bwa mitima.
‘Kuti twitulyo mulambo
    Kuli kalubula.

Mwise ngo mumyo kupala
    ‘Nshita ya mapepo,
Ne ciswebebe cikabe
    Bala lya mufundo.

Mwise kuno nge cipele.
    Muletyo  mutende,
‘Cilonganino mu calo
    Cibe nge ca mulu.

Mwise kuno nge cipupu,
    Bupe bwa pentekost;
E lyo bamone mu calo
    Ululumbi lwenu.

Mwe Mupashi sanguleni
    ‘Calo cibe cenu;
Mwike na maka ya luse,
    Mwise mwe mupashi.

title: CH 182.
CH 188.
content:
Mwise, tuli shampofu," , "Come to our Nature's Light", "Mwise, tuli shampofu,
Tupelwe ulubuto,
Mupashi wa ku mulu,
   Kasansamusha.

Tuli babi, tusambwe;
Twalwala, mutuposhe;
Twaluba, tulondolwe;
   Kasansamusha.

Twashiwa ababusa,
Tupelwe fya ku mulu,
‘Luse, nsekwe, cikuku,
   Kasansamusha.

Umutende ngo mume,
Wise utunashe fwe,
Fya kwa Kristu tulangwe,
   Kasansamusha.

Mutupepele bonse,
Lumbuleni kwa Shifwe
‘Kukabilisha kwesu,
   Kasansamusha.

Twishibe bwino Shifwe,
Mu mitima tumfwishe
Ifyo twasangululwa,
   Kasansamusha.

Tutwalwe kuli Lesa
Mu nshila yawamisha,
Ku mulu tukafika,
   Kasansamusha.

title: CH 311.
content:
Mwe Mupashi wa kwa Lesa," , "O Spirit of Living God", "Mwe Mupashi wa kwa Lesa,
    Mu bwingi bwa bupe bwenu,
Konse ukwa bantu benda
    Mwikile palya baluba.

Peleni ndimi sham aka
    Sha kusose shiwi lyenu,
No bupalo bwa ku mulu,
    Konsho kwe landwe lyu-mfwikwa.

‘Mfifi ‘sangukyo lubuto,
    No bulwi bubyo mutende,
Bafilwa mubapya maka,
    No luse lwansho bukali.

Mwe Mupashi, balungikwe
    ‘Bantu bonse kuli Lesa;
Umweo mubapemene,
    ‘Kuti basumine bonse.

Ulupanda lubacimfye,
    Kabese babatishiwe,
‘shina lyakwe lilumbulwe;
    Abantu balitotele.

Lesa Shifwe alefwaya
    ‘Bantu bonse bapusuke;
'Kutemwa kwakwe kucitwe
    ‘Kuti Yesu abe Mfumu.

title: SSS 198.
content:
Bileni shiwi ‘li ukwasangwa babi," , "O Spread the Tidings Round", "Bileni shiwi ‘li ukwasangwa babi,
Kuli mitima iyacule cibi,
We mwina Kristu we, ima ulande fi:
     Waiso Mupashi.

       Waiso Mupashi, waiso Mupashi,
       ‘Wafuma ku mulu, ca bupe cikulu;
       Bileni mwe bonse ku nko sha peno nse:
       Waiso Mupashi.

Inkuta ikali, no mwela wakosa,
Fyonse nafipita, ‘bushiku nabuca,
Pa kwiso lubuto, bupe bwa kwa Lesa;
     Waiso Mupashi.

Yaise Mpalume, Shinganga wa cine,
Apo mweo upya, no butungwa bwine;
Nomba muntu onse ulwimbo naembe:n
     Waiso Mupashi.

Imbenyo lwimbo lu, bonse ba ku mulu,
Na imwe ba pa nshi, mwasukane na bo,
‘Lwimbo lwa kutemwa, ‘lwimbo lwa cikuku:
     Waiso Mupashi.

title: SSS 607.
content:
Ndi wenu Mfumu, nalyumfwe Shiwi" , "I am Thine O Lord", "Ndi wenu Mfumu, nalyumfwe Shiwi
    Ilya kutemwa kwenu;
Lelo ndafwayo kupalamako
    Pepi pepi kuli ‘mwe.

    Mpalamikwe pepi mwe Mfumu
       Kulyo ko mwamfwilile,
    Mpalamikwe pepi pepi mwe Mfumu,
       Kulyo ko mwandashilwe.

Kangobelwe mu kumubombela,
    Mpelwa maka, ‘cikuku;
Mpunamineko no busumino,
    Ndosho mo mufwaila

E yawame nshita napepamo,
    Ilyo mufukamina;
Na ine nsoshanya ne mwe Lesa
    ‘Fyo nsosa ne cibusa.

Kwalibo kutemwa nshingeshiba
    Kano ninshi nkabuke;
 Kwabakwe nseko nshingakumamo,
    Kano ntushe na imwe.

title: SSS 564.
content:
Nshishibe fya ku ntanshi," , "I know not what awaits me", "Nshishibe fya ku ntanshi,
    Lesa ‘mfimba menso;
Na konse mu lwendo lwandi
    Ifipya ‘letapo;
‘Buseko ubo apela
    Buli bwa bupapo.

        Ukwa ‘lentungulula,
        Nkonka, ncetekela;
        Mu mutende wine wine
        Nyimba, “Alishiba.”

Ndemona’ papaleme,
    Te fya kurali ‘yo;
Ulubuto lwa ku mulu
    E lo nsuminamo.
Shilesibantukila fye
    Inyali sha calo.

Nelyo nshaishibisha,
    Wene aishiba,
Anjikata ku kuboko,
    Te kuti andeke.
Ansansamusho mutima,
    Pantu antemwisha.

Ifyo fine ndeenda
    Mu mfifi fititi;
Cikulu nyenda na Lesa,
    ‘Ntungulushi yandi.
Te kuti nyende neka fye
    Nangu pabutile.

title: CH 116. SSS 239.
content:
Mu lupanda nsekelela," , "In the Cross of Christ I Glory", "Mu lupanda nsekelela,
    ‘Lwaimikwe na kale;
Ulubuto ulwe landwe
    Lucilipo pe na pe.

Ngo bulanda buleisa,
    Ne fya kunsakamika,
Mu lupanda mufumamo
    Umutende nseko.

Ngo bulanda buleisa,
    Ne fya kunsankamika,
Mu lupanda kulefuma
    Ulubuto lwacila.

Umusamwe no bulanda
    Fyapalwa ku lupanda;
Umutende e mo uli,
    No buseko ubwa pe.

title: CH 446.
content:
Mwe mpuka ya balendo," , "O Happy Band of Pilgrims", "Mwe mpuka ya balendo,
   Meleya ku ntanshi,
Na Yesu e munenu,
   Kwa Yese e mutwe.

     Mwapalwa nga mwabomba
         Ifyo abombele;
     Mwapalwa nga mwacula
         Ifyo aculile.

‘Lupanda asendele,
   Ni ‘mwe asendele;
Ingala alifwala,
   Ni ‘mwe afwalile.

Fya kumwesha fyaisa,
   ‘Malanda mwakwata,
Lelwe filemutunka,
   Imfwa ikapwisha.

Ifi fyabe fisamo
   Fya mutengo ‘kulu,
Fileba ngo mutanto
   ‘Kunina ku mulu.

Mwe mpuka ya balendo,
   Loleshenyu mulu;
Kulyu bulanda kuno,
   Uko icilambu.

title: CH 62. SSS 562.
content:
Lesa e kacema wandi," , "The Lord's my Shepherd", "Lesa e kacema wandi,
    Nshakakabile pe;
Ku mulemfwe alentwala,
    Ku menshi ya bumi.

Umutima ambwesesha,
    Mu lwedo angafwa,
Mu nshila sha bololoke,
    Pe shina lyakwe fye.

‘Lintu mkenda mu mfwa ine,
    Nshakatine kantu,
Pantu imwe mulesunga,
    No kunsansamusha.

‘Cintamba mwanugikila
    Mu cinso ca babi,
Umutwe wandi mwansuba,
    ‘Nkombo shaisula.

‘Busuma bweka no luse
    Fyakulankokape,
Na mu ganda ya kwaLesa
    Nkekalililamo.

title: CH 369. SSS 227.
content:
Yesu katemwa wandi," , "Jesus, Lover of my Soul", "Yesu katemwa wandi,
    Leka njise kuli ‘mwe,
‘Mabimbi ne cipupu
    Filepano kugansha.
Mumfise mwe katula,
    ‘Mabimbi yapitepo,
Na mu lupusukilo
    Mwingandama ku mpela.

Kafwa umbi nshikwete,
    Kano imwe, mwe Mfumu;
Mwinsha fye, napapata,
    Mwingansunge nshiku pe.
Ndemucetekela pe,
    Muli katula wandi,
‘Mutwe wandi mucinge
    Mu cintelelwe cenu.

Kristu ndemufwaisha,
    Ni ‘mwe ntulo ya fyonse,
‘Maka ya bafililwa,
    No muti wa balwala.
‘Shina lyenu lisuma,
    Ine muntu wabipa,
Ninjisula no bubi,
    Imwe cine, cikuku.

‘Luse lwenu  lwafula,
    Lwa kunsamba ne mubi;
Lwise, lunsambe tutu,
    Lumbutisho mutima.
Ni ‘mwe ntulo ya mweo,
    Nkanwa yengi kuli ‘mwe;
Fukauka muli ‘ne,
    ‘Mweo ushipelela.

title: CH 169.
content:
Kulyu mo wacila bonse," , "One there is Above", "Kulyu mo wacila bonse,
   Wene ni kafwa wine,
‘Luse lwakwe e lwacila,
   Na lo lwa munshipela;
Abwa bamwishibisha
   Bamusanga musuma.

Bushe twakwate cibusa
   Ca kutufwila bonse?
Lelo Yesu e wafwile
   Ku kutuwikishanya.
Te pa kutemwa cine!
   Yesu ni kafwa wine.

Ilyo aikele pa nshi
   Ali kafwa wa babi;
Nomba alisansamikwa
   Acili ifyo fine;
Abenike fibusa,
   Acili abalela.

Tulefwaya icikuku
   Ca kunashe mitima;
Pantu tulaba ilingi
   Kafwa uyu twakwata;
Lelo ‘lintu twafika
   Tukalamutemwisha.

title: SSS 218.
SSS 659.
content:
Yesu namutemwa, Shikulu wandi," , "Lord Jesus I Love Thee", "Yesu namutemwa, Shikulu wandi,
‘Cibwe-camba candi, Umupusushi,
Katula wa luse, nkamwimbila  pe,
E imwe mwalingo kulumbaniwa.

Namutemwa pantu mwatemwa ine,
Mwaliculile cibi ku kalbale,
Ipumi yenu yalashilwe myunga,
E imwe mwalingo ukulumbaniwa.

Kuti namutemwa mu mweo, mu mfwa,
Kuti namutotela nshiku shonse,
No kwimba ningemba ne mfwa pa menso:
E imwe mwalingo kulumbaniwa.

Ilyo tukamona lulumbi lwenu,
Na ‘benu banino kuba ne mwe pe,
Nkapundisha mu bumpashanya bwenu:
E imwe mwakingo kulumbaniwa.

title: SSS 673.
content:
Ukwansha nomba yakulaansha" , "Conquering Now", "Ukwansha nomba yakulaansha
‘Mfumu ya maka yonse;
Yatungulula aba cinshinka
Ukulwisha abalwani.
Balya bashipa balende
Nabafwikwa ifyabuta,
Ukupundisha ishina
Ilya kwa cilongoshi.

       Te ba maka baleansha,
       Nelyo aba lubilo;
       Lelo ni abwa ba cine
       E bakulaansha pe.

“Ukwansha nomba akulaansha,”
 ‘Mfumu iyi ni nani?
Ne fita fyakwe ifingi nga nshi,
 Ni kwi uko fyafuma?
E Mupusushi, Shikulu,
Ni Mfumu ya lulumbi;
Na bantwa balemukonka
Bakabeka nge ntanda.

Ukwansha nomba akulaansha,
Yesu ateka konse;
Ifipuna fyonse fikapita,
Ubuteko bukapwa;
Lelo buteko bwa Mwine
Bukabelelela pe;
Na ifwe mulya mu mwakwe
Tukalatushamo pe.

title: HLL 184.
content:
Mu mapamfyo muno calo" , "‘Midst the Darkness", "Mu mapamfyo muno calo
   Nkalasekelela;
Naishiba ulucelo Kristu akesa.
   Mu lubuto mu mutende
Uko kwa wishi,
   Kristu alendolela,
Alemfuluka.

‘Mupashi wantungulula
   Mu ciswebebe,
Lelo nomba nalamone
   Calo kwa Lesa;
Uko mu luse, ‘lulumbi
   Alenindila;
‘Shina lyandi lyalilembwa,
   Te ‘ti andabe.

Uko mu nyimbo shawama,
   Lumbi alomfwa,
‘Lushindo mu ciswebebe
   Lulepalama.
Ukwe miputule yonse
   Aliteyanya,
Lelo nabwinga apelwa
   Talafikako.

N’ani uyo aleisa
   Ukunkonkela,
Ngo lutanda lwa lucelo,
   Bwaco lubuto?
E ni uyo wantulile
   Pa kunculila;
Mu lulumbi namwishiba,
   Umo wine pe.

We nseko pa kumonana,
   ‘Kucula kwapwa!
Awe! Ukuposha kwakwe
   Ine nkomfwako;
Wene na ine ‘kwingila
   Pamo mu mulu,
Wene naine ukuba
   Pamo mu mwakwe.

Uko ukushili mfifi
   Nelyo kuluba,
Uko ku calo kwa Lesa
   Tukasoshanya;
Ine ne wasangululwa
   ‘Kuba wakwe pe,
‘Kulumbanya icikuku
   Cakwe kuli ‘ne.

Wene, uyo mu bucushi,
   Anculile ‘ne,
Ne waesesho kukonka
   Mu ciswebebe;
Ifwe pamo mu lulumbi
   Tukasekela.
Candi kuba nankwe pe fye,
   Cakwe kumona.

title: CH 247. SSS 275.
content:
‘Milimo iyi yawama" , "Sweet is the Work", "‘Milimo iyi yawama
Ya kulumbanya, ‘kutota;
‘Kulango lusho lucelo,
‘Kulande cine cungulo.

‘Bushiku bwenu bwawama,
Bwa kupepa no kutasha,
‘Mutima wandi ulinge
‘Kupalama kuli mwe.

Nakulaansha mu Mfumu,
Nakulatashe cikuku.
Milimo yakwe yawama,
‘Mashiwi na yo yasuma.

Ilye cikuku cangwamya,
‘Fintu fyenu nkalabomba;
No buseko mulampela,
E fyo mulansansamusha.

‘Mpulumushi e shilwani,
Tashakancushe kabili;
‘Balwani bakapwa bonse,
Ciwa takamfulunganye.

Lyene nkamona no kumfwa
Fyonse pano nafwaisha,
Mombe na maka na mano,
Mu calo cilia ca nseko.

title: HLL I.
content:
Atotelwe Lesa," , "Blessed be God our God", "Atotelwe Lesa,
Uwatupele Umwana wakwe,
‘Bupe pa bupe bwa kucilako.
Atotelwe Lesa.

Cinshi aletana?
Ifyo atupele ca kucila;
Tatwalingile, e cikuku fye.
Cinshi aletana?

Atupele Mwane,
Ici e catufumisho mwenso,
Ici e catulesho bulanda,
Atupele Mwane.

Kashinina n’ani?
Ifyo Kristu e watufwilile,
Ifyo atusosele ku mulu.
Kashinina n’ani?

Lesa e Kebela,
N’ani ukalule co asosa?
N’ani akatukaka kabili?
Lesa e Kebela.

E bwanshisho bwesu,
Pantu wa maka e watwanshishe,
Atulwile, atucimfishe,
Ebwanshisho bwesu.

title: SSS 91.
content:
Bule shina lya kwa Yesu," , "Take the Name of Jesus", "Bule shina lya kwa Yesu,
    We mwana wa bulanda,
Likakupelo buseko,
    Konse kuntu ukaya.

       Ishina lisuma
       ‘Lya pa nshi no mulu.

Sose sina lya kwa Yesu,
    Libe cishangu konse;
‘Lintu waba no kweshiwa
    Lilumbule, upepe.

Sunge shina lya kwa Yesu,
    Lilekupelo kwanga;
Mu maboko akubula,
    ‘Lwimbo ulemwimbila.

Temwe shina lya kwa Yesu,
    ‘Kuwa pa nkasa shakwe;
Ali Mfumu ya shamfumu,
    Tumutotele bonse.

title: CH 686. SSS 409.
content:
Kabebete Yesu," , "Look away to Jesus", "Kabebete Yesu,
    We wa bulanda,
Alikuculile,
    Kabiye tusha.
‘Bulanda ‘sendele,
    Ne membu shobe;
Kabebete Yesu;
    Mucetekele.

Kabebete Yesu,
    Mwina mwakwe we,
‘Lyo bulwi bwabuka,
    Koselela fye.
‘Balwani baliko,
    Amaka yapwa;
Kabebete Yesu,
    Akulabansha.

Kabebete Yesu
    Na mu milimo,
‘Butusho bukesa
    ‘Nshita inono.
Yesu alekwita,
    ‘Lelo kabiye;
Kabebete Yesu,
    Mu nshila yakwe.

Kulya ku mabumba
    Ya ba kwa Kristu,
Tukalalumbanya
    Katula wesu.
E lyo mu lulumbi
    Lwa mulu lwine,
Tukamona Yesu
    ‘Nshiku shonse pe.

title: CH 370. SSS 235.
content:
Nabebeta imwe," , "My Faith Looks up to Thee", "Nabebeta imwe,
Mwali pa Kalbale,
   ‘Mupusushi;
Mungufwe mwi pepo,
Fibi mufumyemo,
Ndetendeke lelo
   Kuba wenu.

Mumpele cikuku
Cafuma ku mulu,
   Mulenkosha;
Pantu mwamfwilile,
‘Kuti ntemwe imwe,
‘Lelo ne nshiku pe
   Mu mutima

Nga nyenda mu mfifi,
Yaisa macushi,
   Ntungululwe;
Mfifi ‘bya kasuba,
Mufumyo kucula,
Mundesho kufuma
   Kuli imwe.

Ngo lwendo lwa mweo
Lukapwa mu calo,
   Mukansenda.
Mwe Mfumu, mu luse,
‘Fibi fifumiwe,
Mumfisho ko muli,
   ‘Walubulwa.

title: CH 323. SSS 1068.
content:
Ku milundu na ku mpili," , "O’er the Gloomy Hills", "Ku milundu na ku mpili,
   We mutima tambako,
Amalayo ya kwa Lesa
   Yalaisa kuli ‘fwe.
       Aleluya, Aleluya,
       Buce, bubelelele.

Ku bufumu bwa mfifi
   Mutemeko lubuto;
Ku kabanga, ku masamba,
   Buce ubu bushiku;
       ‘Bulubulo, ‘bulubulo,
       Bwise butupyo mweo.

Bushiku bwalswa buce,
   Bwandulule imfifi;
Ne landwe libelelele,
   Lishimikwe, lyanane,
       Konse konse, konse konse,
       Mupepi no kutali.

title: SSS 537.
content:
Yesu nyensha, niluba," , "Saviour Lead me", "Yesu nyensha, niluba,
Nyensha bwino mu nshila;
Ndi bwino nga ulipo,
Muli ‘we njikalemo.

     Nyensha, nyensha,
     Yesu nyensha, niluba;
     Nyensha bwino mu nshila,
     ‘Nshiku shonse ne nshita.

Ni ‘we cubo kuli ‘ne,
Nga matunko yes ape;
Ndi fye ngo li mupepi,
Ncetekela muli ‘we.

Yesu nyensha ku mpela
Ya bwikalo na ku mfwa;
Nsuke mfike kwi shilya
Kulyo bulanda bwapwa.

title: CH 499. SSS 606.
content:
Mwe Yesu ninsumina" , "O Jesus I Have Promised", "Mwe Yesu ninsumina
   ‘Kumutumikila;
Mube pepi na ine,
   Mwe Kafwa, Shikulu.
Te ‘ti ntine ifyabipa,
   Nga muli mupepi;
Nelyo kalubantika
   Nga muli na ine.

Ng'umfwe fyo muli ‘pepi
   ‘Fya calo filipo;
Namone fintwi fingi,
   Ne filentunkapo.
‘Balwani na bo bali
   Mu kati na ku nse;
Mwe Yesu mupalame,
   Mumbake ku fibi.

Ng'umfwe ifyo mulelanda
   Ne shiwi lyawama,
‘Kukanaumfwe fya fye.
   Nelyo ifyabipa.
Soseni njishibishe,
   No kutungulula;
Soseni ngumfwikishe,
   Mwabako mutima.

Mwe Yesu mwalaile
   Bonsha bamukonka
Baka uko muli,
   ‘Cifulo cisuma.
Mwe Yesu nalaile
   ‘Kutumikila pe;
Bampele icikuku,
   Mwe Shikulu, nkonke.

Kamone nkasa shenu,
   Nyendemo ne mwine;
Nakulakonka bwino,
   Mu maka yenu pe.
Ntungululwe, munjite,
   Munjikatishe pe;
E lyo mumpokelele,
   Ku mulu kuli ‘mwe.

title: CH 331.
content:
Umfweni! yalya mashiwi," , "Hark, the Sound of Holy Voices", "Umfweni! yalya mashiwi,
    Bemba kulyo ko muli;
Aleluya! Aleluya!
    Aleluya kuli ‘mwe!
Ibumba, awe, ni tunta,
    Beminine ukwimba;
Bafwikwa ne fyabutisha,
    ‘Fya bwanshisho bekata.

Nabafuma mu maculo,
    Balisambwe mitima
No mu lopa wa kwa Yesu,
    Baeshiwa, bashansha.
Basokwe, no kukakwa,
    Balashilwe no kufwa;
Bayanshe mfwa na satana,
    Mu maka ya kwa Lesa.

Baleenda no luunga
    Lwa lupando lwacimfya;
Balekonka imwe bene,
    ‘Mupusushi, Katula.
Bamuculile ne nseko,
    No kumfwila pamo,
Na mu mfwa basango mweo
    Wa pe wa ciyayaya.

Baleteka mu bukata,
    Balenda mu lubuto;
Balenwa nga ku mumana
    ‘Buseko bwa mushilo.
‘Mutende bene bakwata,
    ‘Kutemwa na ko kwa pe;
Ilyo baikala palya
    Bamona Leso mwine.

Yesu Kristwa ba ni Lesa,
    Ali ne ‘fwe, ‘Manyule;
Mu mubili wakwe wine
    ’Bena mwakwe ‘mo bali.
Mutwafwe ‘kuti tutote,
    Kuli Lesa patatu:
Lesa Shifwe, Leso Mwana,
    Na Lesa Umupashi.

title: SSS 778.
content:
Bomba tabulaila," , "Work for the Night is Coming", "Bomba tabulaila,
Bomba apo bwaca,
Bomba kucilyu mume
Wa pa maluba.
Bomba kacelocelo,
Bombe ilyo kabala,
Bomba tabulaila,
‘Lyo tababomba.

Bomba tabulaila,
Bomba kasansama,
Bomba inshita shonse,
Lyenyu katusha.
Te kuti wikale fye,
Kano ulebomba;
Bomba tabulaila,
‘Lya tababomba.

Bomba tabulaila,
‘Kasuba kacepa;
Bomba ucilya mona,
Pantu kaleya.
Bombo lubuto lwaya,
No kukanabwela.
Bomba tababomba.

title: SSS 745.
content:
Mu bulanda bonse ubo usanga," , "", "Mu bulanda bonse ubo usanga,
Mu kushuka konse, mu kupelelwa,
Pende fintu fyonse Lesa akupa,
Cine uletasha pantu fyafula.

     Pende fintu fyonse fisuma,
     Pende fya bupe bwa kwa Lesa,
     Pende kale, pende na nomba,
     Cine uletasha pantu fyafula.

Wafininwa no kucula we mwana;
Ulupanda nausenda lwafina;
Pende fintu fyonse Lesa akupa,
‘Lwimbo kumutotela ulesanga.

Nomba mu kulwisha konse witendwa,
Lesa mukalamba alekumona,
Wene aishibe nshila uleya
‘Lwendo lonse ‘Mwine akulakwafwa.

title: CH 352. SSS 365.
content:
Umfwo mutima wandi," , "Hark my Soul", "Umfwo mutima wandi,
Nishikulu, aleti,
Yesu alekwipusha:
“Bushe cine wantemwa?

“Nakukakwile kale,
‘Filaso naposeshe;
‘Lubuto nakupele,
‘Mfifi yobe nalwile.

“Bushe nyina alabe
‘Mwana untu afyele?
Nalimo kutya laba,
Ine ndakwibukisha.

“Luse luntu mbelo lu
Lwacile fya mu mulu.
Lwacile fya mwi samba,
Lwa cine, lwacile mfwa.

“Ukamono lulumbi
Lintu Tata ampele;
Ukekala na ine
Pa cipuna candi pe.”

Ine ndi no bulanda,
Kutemwa nshakwatisha;
Cine imwe natemwa,
Lelo mfwayo kucisha.

title: CH 444.
content:
“Sumbulo lupanda," , "Thou Say’ st “Take up they Cross”", "“Sumbulo lupanda,
   We muntu we, nkonka,
Kuli mfifi, natunaka,
   Lelo twalakonka.

Mwe mfumu twafwaya
   ‘Kuti tumumone
Ku mpumi yenwa kashita,
   E lyo tulekonka

Mu nshita sha kale
   Twaleulunta fye;
Lelo nomba katubwele,
   Ni ‘mwe twalakonka.

‘Shiwi lyaumfwikwa
   Ilya ku Ngalile,
Twaiso kumunakila,
   ‘Kuti tumukonke.

Ifwe tuli mpofu,
   Na matwi yakoma,
Mutwafwe mu maka yenu,
   E lyo twalakonka.

Mu mitima yesu
   Iseni mupepi,
Tekeni muli ‘fwe benu,
   Mwe Mfumu twakonka.

title: SSS 672.
content:
Bushe ndi mushilikale," , "A Soldier of the Cross", "Bushe ndi mushilikale,
    Kakonka wa Mpanga?
Bushe nkatina mu nshila,
    No kuba ne nsoni?

         Ishina . . . Ilyawama . . .
         Wene amfwile;
         Mu cikuku nkapokela
         Icitebo candi.

Bushe nje mu mulu mulya
    ‘Kwabulo kucula,
Ilyo bambi balecula
    Mu fikali fyonse?

Bushe ;balwani tapali
    Aba kulwa na bo?
Bushe calo cilengafwa
    ‘Kufika ku mulu?

‘Kulwa kwandi kwiba kwa fye,
    Mukonshe mwe Mfumu;
Nkashipikisha macusho
    Mi mashiwi yenu.

title: CH 304.
content:
Mwe fita fya lupanda," , "Soldier of the Cross", "Mwe fita fya lupanda,
   ‘Fya kulwila fwaleni;
Satana e wa maka,
   Mwe baume koseni.

Na mu calo ca mfifi
   Imyeni uluunga,
Ulu lufunguluke,
   Ku ntashi lusumbulwe.

Mu mishi ya bulanda,
   Tamwaba na mashiwi,
Mwe nkombe sha kwa Yesu.
   Kabiyeni ne landwe.

‘Kuntu kwabe finshingwa,
   Batwalileni cine;
Uko kwabe fyabipa,
   ‘Bupususho mwananye.

Ku banaka, ‘baluba,
   Bebeni no mutende;
Ku baposwa, ‘balanda,
   Soseni umutende.

Sungeni abapina,
   Sansamusheni bonse;
Mu maka ya kwa Lesa,
   Tamfyeni fibi fyonse.

Fungululenyu lunga,
   No lupanga lwe Shiwi,
Fisuke fyalo fyonse
   Fikabe fya kwa Yesu.

title: CH 701. SSS 706.
content:
Mwe bashilikale," , "Onward Christian Soldiers", "Mwe bashilikale,
   Mwaya ku buta,
‘Lupanda lwa Mwine
   Luletangila.
Yesu ‘Mfumu yesu,
   Akulatwensha,
No luunga lwesu
   Twakulasenda.

       Mwe bashilikale,
           Mwaya ku buta,
       ‘Lupanda lwa Mwine
           Luletangila.

Pa bwanshisho bwesu
   Baletamfwa;
E lya ba kwa Yesu,
   Twendeni, twanshe,
Na pa kwimba kwesu
   Ku Mbo kwatenta;
Imbileni Yesu,
   Shi sansuleni.

‘Bumba lya kwa Lesa,
   Cilonganino;
Bane, tuleenda
   Nga ba mushilo.
‘Fwe mubili umo,
   Tatwalekana
Mu bucetekelo
   Nelyo mu luse.

E twendeni bane,
   Na bonse pamo,
Na mashiwi twimbe
   Ulwimbo lwesu:
Pelenyo lulumbi
   Ku Mfumu Yesu;
‘Bantwa balubulwa
   Baleimbo lu.

title: CH 487. SSS 616.
content:
Buleni ine wine," , "Take my Life", "Buleni ine wine,
Naipela kuli ‘mwe;
‘Nshiku shandi shonse fye,
Leka mulumbanye pe.

Buleni minwe yandi,
‘Kuti imubombele;
‘Makasa yandi na yo
Yamukonkyo lubilo.

Buleni shiwi lyandi,
‘Kuti nyimbile imwe;
Pamo na kanwa kandi,
Kesulemo Ilandwe.

Buleni fyuma fyandi
Awe te ‘ti mutane.
‘Maka yandi na mano,
Kumubombele na yo.

Buleni mifwaile,
Ndepela kuli imwe;
Mu mutima wandyu yu
Mube cipuna cenu.

Buleni ukutemwa,
‘Kuti mutemwe mweka;
Mumbule ine wine,
‘Kuti mbe wenu onse.

title: CH 490. SSS 581.
content:
Kamupalamine," , "Nearer my God to Thee", "Kamupalamine,
    Lesa wandi,
Ngo mwenso wandeta
    Uko muli;
‘Lwimbo lwandi lube:
Kamupalamine,
    Lesa wandi.

Nga ndi mu bulendo,
    Naililwa,
‘Mfifi yafitisha,
    Nalala fye.
Mu ciloto mpepa:
Kamupalamine,
    Lesa wandi.

Ilyo nasamina
    ‘Mutwe pe bwe,
No busanshi bwandi
    Ni pa nshi fye;
E lyo mpepa, ntila:
Kamupalamine,
    Lesa wandi.

‘Lintu nashibuka,
    Natotela,
E lyo natole bwe,
    Ncite Betel.
Mu bulanda ntila:
Kamupalmine,
    Lesa wandi.

‘Lintu nkashe calo,
    Nkapupuka,
Nungame ku mulu
    Uko muli,
No lu lwimbo lube:
Kamupalamine,
    Lesa wandi.

title: SSS 556.
content:
Yesu muntungulule" , "Jesus Saviour Pilot me", "Yesu muntungulule
Pa cimana ca mweo;
Amabimbi yaisa,
‘Mabwe ayabelama
Imwe mwaishibisha,
Yesu mutungulule.

‘Fyo nyina ‘lelo mwana,
Mwingateke cimana;
‘Mabimbi yaikala,
‘Lintu muleyasosha;
Mwe Mfumu ya cimana,
Yesu muntungulule.

‘Lintu nkapalamikwa,
No mwenso wanjikata;
Lyene nkacetekela,
Mukangafwo kupepa,
Na mwi sano mwa Lesa,
E, mukantungulula.

title: CH 510.
content:
Mwe Mfumu, nyende na imwe" , "O Master let me Walk", "Mwe Mfumu, nyende na imwe
Mu milimo ya bufuke;
Munjebe nkama mwakwata
Ya kuti na ine nshipe.

Mungafwe ncincisha bantu
Ne shiwi lya luse lwenu;
Nkatungululya baluba
Ku nshila yenu yawama.

Mufundishe umukosha;
Njikale mwi senge lyenu.
‘Milimo intu mumpela
Yafwe ‘busumo bwandi.

‘Lubuto lwenu lube pe
Pa nshila yandi pano nse;
‘Mutende wenu mumpele,
Mwe Mfumu njikale ne mwe.

title: CH 695. SSS 542.
content:
Lesa alentungulula," , "He Leadeth me", "Lesa alentungulula,
Na ku mutima kwabuta;
Pano isonde ndeenda,
Lesa alentungulula.

    Lesa alentungulula,
    Ku kuboko anjikata;
    Ine nakulamukonka,
    Lesa alentungulula.

Nangu nyende mwasapisha,
Nangu mu nshila yabuta,
Mu fisuma, mu fyabipa,
Lesa alentungulula.

Mwe Lesa, nyende na imwe,
‘Kwabulo kuti ngwingwinte.
Nyende no mutima-nteka.
Lesa alentungulula.

‘Lintwi milimo ikapwa,
Ulwendo lwandi lwapela,
Nshakatine lintu nkafwa,
Lesa alentungulula.

title: SSS 901.
content:
Ilintu mutende uleya na ine," , "When Peace like a River", "Ilintu mutende uleya na ine,
Nangwa malanda yes ape;
Ni mwe mwafundisho kuti njishibe,
Mutende, mutende kuli ‘ne.

    Mutende . . . kuli ‘ne . . . 
    Mutende, mutende kuli ‘ne.

Satana nga ‘ntunka, nga kwiso kweshiwa,
Ninjishibe landwe ili,
Alimfwilile, Kristu nandubula,
Mutende, mutende kuli ‘ne.

Impulumushi shintu nacitacita,
Te shimo fye, lelo shonse,
Shalipampaminwa na ku lupanda,
Mutende, mutende kuli ‘ne.

Na ine ndefwaya njikalile Kristu;
Nga yakamfimba mabimbi,
Te kuti ntine; mu mfwa na mu mweo,
Mutende, mutende kuli ‘ne.

E kwisa kwenu ndepembela, mwe Mfumu,
Ku mwesu te ku cilindi;
‘Penga lya mungeli, ‘shiwi lya Mfumu,
Mutende, mutende kuli ‘ne.

title: CH 520. SSS 786.
content:
Munsosho kuti ‘ne nsose" , "Lord Speak to me", "Munsosho kuti ‘ne nsose
    Umusango umo wine;
‘Fyo mwalefwaya, kamfwaye
    Abana benwa baluba.

Muntungululyo kuti ‘ne
    Ntungulule abaluba,
Mundisho kuti ‘ne ndishe
    Abana benwa ba nsala.

Mukonshe mu kwiminina
    Palibwe lya maka yenu,
Ntambikyo kuboko kwandi
    Ku bantwa baleibila.

Mufundisho kuti mfunde
    Fintu fyenu ifya cine,
‘Mashiwi yandi yengile
    Mu ba mitima yakosa.

Mumpelyo butusho bwenu,
    ‘Kuti nsose no kutemwa;
Amashiwi ayalinga
    Ku bafilwa, ‘ba bulanda.

Mumpale mwe Mfumu yandi,
    ‘Kutyu mutima wisule
‘Matontonkanyo ya luse,
    Mbalangyo kutemwa kwine.

Munegyo kumubombela
    Konsho ko mwasontelela,
Nsuke ‘mumone pa menso,
    Nsekele, ntushe ku mulu.

title: SSS 749.
content:
Yangu! Abalimi nga bali kwi?" , "O Where are the Reapers?", "Yangu! Abalimi nga bali kwi?
    Bese balobolole mu fibi.
Ifya kulobolwelako cine,
    Kukanatusha basuka bapwa.

Aba kusepa nga bali kwi
    ‘Ba kwisabombo bulobololo?
Aba kutwafwo kulobolola
    Abantu babi ku fyabipa.

Mu nshila sha tondo kabiyeni,
    Musote nge ngano mu finangwa;
Mufwailishe na mu misebo,
    No kwisabengisha mu bufumu.

Ingano nashipya konse konse,
    Balelinda ubulobololo;
Bwakulisha, ‘balimi bacepa,
    Bwalaoneka nga bwakokola.

E co ishileni ne fikwakwa,
    Mwe bana, mutuntululya Male.
Bombesheni ‘suke Mfumu ise
    Ku kususo bulimi ne nseko.

title: SSS 508.
content:
Wange mu Mfumu, na mu luse lwakwe," , "Rejoice in the Lord", "Wange mu Mfumu, na mu luse lwakwe,
    ‘Mwine e watukakwile;
Twalilubulwa mu mulopa wakwe,
    Nomba kuti twatina nshi?

         Tuli na Lesa, tuli na Lesa, tuli na Lesa,
     N’ani wa kututinya, n’ani?
     N’ani nombo wa kututinya?

Kosa mu Mfumu, na mu maka yakwe,
    Ubyo muntu wa cine pe;
Pa kwise fibi, uleshangila fye,
    Kristu e nkwela tukwete.

Sumine Mfumu, na mwi Buku lyakwe,
    Ifyalembwamo fya cine;
‘Calo cikapwa, ‘mulu na o pamo,
    Ili likabelelela.

Uba mu Mfumu, mu kuboko kwakwe,
    E kutendeka kwa mweo.
‘Mulwani onse, nangu abe n’ani,
    Te kuti akufumyemo.

title: SSS 520.
content:
Mfisa we Mfumu, we mwine," , "Hide me O my Saviour", "Mfisa we Mfumu, we mwine,
   Mu lwafyo lobe,
‘Lulumbi lobe,
   ‘Nkumone pa menso.

       Mfisa, mfisa,
           We Mupusushi mfisa,
       We Mfumu ndama,
           Mfisame muli ‘we.

Icipupu canyimina
   Kuno uko ndi,
Mpisha ku mulu wa ciko,
   Nsumbulwe kuli ‘we.

‘Musana nga wafunika
   Mu kuculisha,
Pa kukuta, “Mfumu ngafwa,”
   We mwine ngasuka.

Mfisa Mfumu, napapata,
   Nshili na maka,
We wa maka Mupusushi,
   Ni ‘we Mulubushi.

title: CH 694. SSS 577.
content:
Ndamukabila pe," , "I Need Thee", "Ndamukabila pe,
    Mwe Mfumu yandi,
Tapali na umbi
    Wa kumpo mutende.

         Nkabila pe nkabila,
              Imwe pe bkabila;
         Mumpale nomba line,
              Naisalomba.

Ndamukabila pe,
    Mwikale mupepi;
‘Mutunko yali fye
    Nga muli kuntu ndi.

Ndamukabila pe,
    ‘Kwanga no kucula;
Nga tamwapalame,
    ‘Mweo wandi wa nshi?

Nda mukabila pe,
    Mufundishe fyenu,
No bulayo bwine
    Mumfikilishe.

Ndamukabila pe,
    Mwe ba mushilo,
Nomba nsangululwe,
    Mumpalyo bupalo.

title: CH 211.
content:
‘Mfumu ya bumi, Lesa wa mu mulu," , "Lord of our Life", "‘Mfumu ya bumi, Lesa wa mu mulu,
Ni mwe fye mweka, lubuto lwa bantu,
Mumfwa mapepo ‘lintu tulelomba,
   ‘Mfumu ya maka.

Moneni fya mabimbi yatuwisha,
Moneni fita fyatushunguluka;
Mwe Mfumu, ilye fibi fyatucusha,
   Mutupusushe.

‘Mfumu itwafwe lintwa maka yapwa,
‘Mfumu tutule ku fyabipa fyesu.
Tapali umbi wa kucila imwe,
   Penyu mutende.

Mutwafwe bonse mumatontonkanyo,
Bakenya benu, mubasambilishe,
Mutekya bantu ukuli lubuli,
   Bakeni bonse.

Tutulwe bonse, mucimfye fyabipa,
Tulenya babi, bena balapile.
Ilintu kulwa kwa mu calo kwapwa,
   Tuye ku mulu.

title: CH 455.
content:
Yesu, mutwenshe," , "Jesus, still lead on", "Yesu, mutwenshe,
    Tuye tutushe,
Nelye nshila ilecusha,
Tukakonka no kukosa;
    Tungululeni,
    Twende na imwe.

    ‘Nshila yayafya,
    Satana ‘pamfya,
Twitwishika no kutina,
Tube fye abasumina;
    Twende tushipe
    Na ku balwani.

    Ilyo twacula,
    Nga batusula;
Nga twatunkwa no kweshiwa,
Mwisetwafwa mwe kacimfya;
    Tulosha menso
    Uko ku mwesu.

    Yesu mutwenshe,
    Tuye tutushe;
‘Ntumgulushi ya ku mulu,
Mutucinge muno calo,
    Tusuke tube
    Pamo na imwe.

title: CH 405. SSS 726.
content:
Umutende, mu calo cabipa?" , "Peace, Perfect Peace", "Umutende, mu calo cabipa?
Mutende, Yesu atepelesha.

Umutende, nge ncito yapamfya?
‘Kubombela, Yesu e kutusha.

Umutende, ‘bulanda bwafula?
Mutende kwa Yesu pa cifuba.

Umutende, mfuluka ku mwesu?
Mutende mu kulamwa na Yesu.

Umutende nge mfwa ileshinga?
Na maka Yesu ayanshishe mfwa.

E cisuma; fyonse fikaleka.
‘Mutende wa ku mulu watwita.

title: CH 158. SSS 60.
content:
Yesu ‘lintu mwibukisha" , "Jesus the very Thought of Thee", "Yesu ‘lintu mwibukisha
    ‘Mutima wabuta;
Ukumonana pa menso
    Kwena cikacila.

Mu fyalo fyonse fya pa nshi,
    Na mu mulu mwine,
‘Shina lyenu e lyawama,
    Mwe katula wandi.

‘Bucetekelo bwa bonse
    Abwa bapelelwa;
Abakawa mukabemya,
    Mwe bakwata maka.

Abamusanga bashuka
    Imwe mwabatemwa;
Twafilwo kulumbulula
    Ukutemwa kwenu.

Yesu mubyo kwanga kwesu,
    ‘Nshiku shonse pano;
Mukabo lulumbi lwesu
    Ku mulu ku mwenu.

title: CH 161. SSS 112.
content:
‘Shina lya Yesu busuma" , "How Sweet the Name", "‘Shina lya Yesu busuma
    Ku ba busumino!
Lilefumya ubulanda,
    No kutamfyo mwenso.
